Job Title: Tech Support Specialist (Solar & Field Coordination)

Reports To: Operations Manager

Expected Salary Rate: TBD, based on experience



Role Summary:

We are seeking a bilingual-level English speaker to act as the critical link between customers, manufacturers (SolarEdge, Tesla, Enphase), and our field technicians. Beyond troubleshooting, you will own field associate scheduling and develop the SOPs that define this role.



Key Responsibilities:

- Customer & Manufacturer Support: Diagnose residential solar issues via phone/screen share. Initiate and manage warranty cases directly with SolarEdge Technologies, Tesla, Inc., and Enphase Energy to resolve RMA and firmware issues.

- Field Tech Assistance: Guide field techs in real-time using live system data (monitoring portals) to verify proper installation, commissioning, and troubleshooting steps.

- Scheduling & Dispatch: Own the master calendar, coordinate daily routes for field associates, and prioritize emergency service calls.

- SOP Development: Create and maintain clear, step-by-step Standard Operating Procedures for troubleshooting workflows, manufacturer escalation paths, and scheduling protocols.



Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable):

Language: Excellent spoken English (C1/C2 level) – clear, professional, accent-agnostic but highly intelligible.

Tech Stack: Hands-on experience with SolarEdge (monitoring & designer), Tesla (Gateway/Backup Switch), and Enphase (Enlighten/Toolkit).

Logistics: Proven ability to schedule multiple field resources efficiently.

Documentation: Experience writing technical SOPs or runbooks.



Preferred (But Not Required):

Prior use of dispatch software (ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro) or CRM tools.



Success Measures (KPIs):

Manufacturer case closure time (< 48 hours)

Field tech arrival time adherence (95%)

Completion of 6 core SOPs within first 60 days



To Apply:

Record a 1-minute voice clip explaining how you would troubleshoot a “panel production low” alert for an Enphase system.

Prepare your resume and cover letter, include your expected rate per hour.

 all requirements to 

Use the subject line: Interested – Technical Support Specialist

Attach your voice clip, resume, and cover letter

title: Real Estate Property Inspector  (UK-Focused | Remote)
description:
We are Hiring: Real Estate Property Inspector (Remote)



Join our growing team! We are looking for a detail-oriented Real Estate Property Inspector to assist with virtual inspections and client communication.



Job Responsibilities:

• Conduct virtual property inspections with clients

• Make outbound phone calls to schedule and confirm inspections

• Document findings clearly and accurately



Requirements:

• At least 1 year of experience working in an international BPO environment

• Ability to work in a fully remote setup

• Excellent communication skills (written & verbal)

• Stable, high-speed internet connection (minimum 100 Mbps fiber subscription)

• Dedicated home workspace (camera must remain ON during inspections; no background noise, people, or distractions)

• Professional, dependable, and reliable work ethic



Remote -Work from home | Flexible Hours | Training Provided



If you are interested, send us your CV via Online Jobs PH messaging



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Vercel To Shopify (Developer)
description:
Core outcome of this role: Take client websites built in Vercel/Next.js and migrate them accurately into fully functional, on-brand Shopify stores — fast and without hand-holding.



We literally provide you the Vercel and you have to copy each section precisely



Top traits I care about:



Highly detail-oriented — pixel accuracy matters, the shopify must look the exact same as vercel

Self-sufficient — can problem-solve without constant check-ins

Fast executor — meets deadlines without chasing

Communicates proactively — flags issues early, doesn't go quiet, constant communication



Required experience:



Proven experience migrating or rebuilding sites from Vercel/Next.js into Shopify

Deep knowledge of Shopify theme customisation (Liquid, sections, blocks)

Ability to replicate layouts, typography, and spacing with precision

Portfolio or examples of past Shopify builds required



Essential experience:



Familiarity with Framer

Familiarity with Shopify

Converting Vercel sites

Experience working with design-led agencies or founders

Understanding of ecommerce UX best practices



Active hours and response expectation:



Flexible hours — work when it suits you

Reply within 1 hour during agreed working days



Bonuses for fast turnaround and quality work

Long-term rate increases available for reliable performers



Non-negotiables:



Must have verifiable past Shopify work

No ghosting — communication is everything

Must be able to start as soon as possible



Application requirements:



***COMPLETE THIS TRIAL JOB & SEND IT TO MY WHATSAPP 
*** 



I want you to convert this vercel into a fully functioning shopify store ready for import/export







Please do not message UNTIL this trial has been completed to filter out unqualified candidates



Also include a link to your portfolio or 2–3 relevant examples.



Extra context that matters:



This is a remote, async role — you won't be micromanaged

Projects come in batches so speed and reliability are highly valued

Strong performers have a clear path to becoming a go-to contractor for ongoing work

title: Product Researcher — Fashion | Google Shopping | Full-Time Remote
description:
Read this fully before applying.

We are a fashion brand selling exclusively via Google Shopping. We are looking for a Product Researcher who knows how to find winning products, understands the Google Shopping ecosystem, and can back every decision with data. If you guess instead of research, this is not the role for you.



What you will own



Research trending and high-potential fashion products

Analyze competition, pricing, and demand on Google Shopping

Identify gaps in the market we can capitalize on

Track winning products and report findings clearly

Stay ahead of fashion trends and translate them into product opportunities





What we're looking for



Proven experience in product research for a fashion brand

Hands-on experience with Google Shopping — you understand how listings, pricing, and competition work on the platform

Strong analytical mindset — you work with data, not gut feeling

Eye for fashion trends

Clear and structured communicator

Self-managed and proactive





Do not apply if:



You have never done product research for a fashion brand

You have no experience with Google Shopping

You cannot show real examples of products you found and why

You need daily supervision





How to apply

Send us a Loom video — applications without this will not be read:



Briefly introduce yourself (max 1 minute)

Walk us through how you do product research — show your actual process, tools, and thinking (max 3 minutes)



No Loom = no response.

title: Already Using ChatGPT? Let's Build Something Bigger - Operations + AI Automation Assistant
description:
You already use ChatGPT or Claude in your daily work. Maybe you've played around with Make or n8n. Maybe you've built a small automation or two, or maybe you've just been itching to try.

Either way, you know AI is the future, and you want to go deeper.

I'm the founder of a growing Danish e-commerce company, and I'm building a team where AI isn't a buzzword, it's how we actually run the business. I'm looking for someone who can handle real operations work today, and help me automate it all tomorrow.

This role has two possible directions depending on your strengths and interests:

Path A: Customer Experience + AI. You take ownership of our customer support, learn every type of question and issue, and then build the AI systems that handle the repetitive ones automatically.

Path B: Supply Chain + AI. You manage inventory, suppliers, and logistics, and then build automations that monitor stock levels, flag issues, and keep everything running without manual check-ins.

Both paths lead to the same place: you becoming the person who builds the systems that run the business.

Day to day, you'll:



Handle real operations work (customer messages, supplier coordination, inventory, logistics)

Identify repetitive processes and map them out

Build and improve automations using tools like n8n, Make, ChatGPT, and Claude

Work directly with me to design workflows that replace manual tasks

Take ownership of your area and make it run smoother every week



You are:



Fluent in English, written and spoken. Non-negotiable.

Already using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) in your work or personal projects.

Familiar with n8n or Make, even if it's just basic flows or personal experiments. Or genuinely eager to learn them now.

Organized and detail-oriented. Automations built on messy thinking break.

Proactive. You see a problem, you fix it, you don't wait to be told.

Someone who gets excited about making things more efficient, not just doing the work.



This is not a "watch tutorials and learn someday" role. You'll be building real automations from week one.

Some overlap with European daytime hours is needed, but we're flexible on exactly when.

title: Inventory and Logistics Manager (Shopify)
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and proactive individual to take full ownership of our supply chain and inventory operations.



This role is critical to our business. You will ensure we always have the right stock, maintain smooth communication with suppliers and logistics partners, and help us scale operations efficiently.



???? This role also has strong long-term growth potential. If you prove yourself, you will eventually take on the responsibility of managing our customer service team.

Create and manage purchase orders with suppliers

Communicate directly with suppliers (primarily in China)

Coordinate shipments with forwarders (booking, tracking, follow-ups)

Keep the owner updated on key developments and risks

Maintain and update data using Google Sheets and other tools

Continuously improve processes and adapt as the company grows

Fully remote

We are not focused on specific tools experience. Instead, we value mindset and ability to execute.



Non-negotiable:



Can work independently with minimal supervision

Strong English communication and comprehension skills

Extremely detail-oriented and structured

Fast learner and quick to adapt

Takes ownership and follows through without reminders

Confident speaking over the phone in English when communicating with partners such as couriers or logistics providers



Important:

This role requires someone who can think ahead, not just follow instructions.



? Nice to Have

Experience working with suppliers or forwarders

Familiarity with tools such as:

Shopify

???? You are expected to use AI tools smartly, especially ChatGPT for translating English to Danish when needed.

AI tools

Competitive salary

title: Junior Operations & Logistics Assistant - Right Hand to the Founder
description:

You'll start by managing inventory, coordinating with suppliers and our 3PL warehouse, and keeping our supply chain running smoothly. But this isn't a "just follow the checklist" role.

Monitoring inventory levels and reorder timing across our brands

Coordinating with suppliers, freight forwarders, and our 3PL warehouse

title: AI Image Editor, Video Editor, Graphic Design, Full Time Role Longterm
description:
VIDEO & IMAGE EDITOR (E-COM / META ADS) — FULL-TIME



*Please read every single word carefully to join our amazing team and evolve into a senior role!*



We are scaling aggressively across Europe — and we need execution killers who understand that creatives = revenue.



This is not a freelance gig.

This is a long-term seat inside a fast-growing performance team.



If you want stability, growth, and real responsibility — keep reading.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



• Full-time position (8h/day, 5–6 days/week)

• Stable monthly income (no guessing, no chasing clients)

• Long-term growth path inside the company

• Daily work — no downtime, no “waiting for tasks”

• Direct impact on ad performance (your work = results)



We are not building a freelancer pool.

We are building a core team of operators.

YOUR CORE MISSION



You produce high-converting ad creatives for Meta 
/Instagram).



Not art. Not design for beauty.



Performance. Speed. Output. Accuracy.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAILY



• Edit and localize ad images (text, pricing, offers, names)

• Adapt creatives for different markets (Sweden, Germany, NL/BE, Israel, UK)

• Edit videos (subtitles, pacing, cuts, hooks)

• Replace text on images cleanly and professionally

• Match creatives EXACTLY to funnel + offer

- Use Freepik, Higgsfield and Nano Banana Pro For Image Translation

- Use Upscaler if needed

- Use Elevenlabs for Video Dubbing



NEXT-LEVEL EXPECTATION (THIS IS WHERE MOST FAIL)



We are not just looking for an editor.



We want someone who understands what converts.



You should be able to:



• Recreate winning ads using AI (image-to-image, variations, iterations)

• Improve competitor creatives — not just copy them

• Know when to upscale / enhance — and when NOT to

• Understand how ecom ads are structured (hooks, CTAs, angles)

• Spot weak creatives instantly and fix them



Bonus (HIGHLY valuable):



• Research winning ads in the market

• Identify new angles based on product + buyer psychology

• Create high-converting CTAs and ad variations

• Use tools like Claude for copy + ideation

• Stay updated on Meta ad trends and what’s working NOW

If you’re obsessed with “why ads work” — you will dominate here.



TOOLS YOU SHOULD HANDLE



• Adobe (Photoshop, Premiere)

• CapCut

• AI tools (ElevenLabs, Freepik, Higgsfield, etc.)

- understand to create image and video / frame prompts, story telling and imrpove your own prompting with ai itself



We expect speed through tools + AI, not manual slow work.



WORK STANDARD



• High daily output

• Fast execution

• Clean, simple edits (no overdesign)

• Strict adherence to templates and systems



This is production at scale.



ATTENTION TO DETAIL (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Mistakes = lost money.



You must ALWAYS check:



• Correct language + localization

• Prices, currencies, offers

• Spelling (no exceptions)

• Alignment, spacing, layout

• Clean, professional output



If you are sloppy — this role will not work.



COMMUNICATION



• Fast responses

• Clear updates

• Ask when unclear



We move fast. You need to match that speed.



???? COMPENSATION



• Start: $4-7.5/hour (full-time)

• Increase: $6–7-8/hour based on performance

• Bonuses for strong output



Stable income. Long-term growth.



GROWTH PATH



If you perform:



• Creative Lead

• Ad Creative Strategist

• Higher-paid roles with more ownership



We promote from inside.



WHO THIS IS FOR



You are:



• Fast, sharp, and detail-focused

• Comfortable with repetition + high output

• Interested in ecom, ads, and performance

• Hungry to improve and grow

• Reliable — no excuses



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



• Slow designers

• “Artists” who ignore performance

• People who need constant guidance

• Inconsistent freelancers



HOW TO APPLY



Send:



Tools you use

Examples (images + videos)

Experience with ad creatives (if any)

Your PC specs + internet speed

Answer: Why do you want a long-term role instead of freelance?



-------------



???? VIDEO & IMAGE EDITOR (E-COM / META ADS) — FULL-TIME



Pakiusap: Basahin nang mabuti ang bawat detalye kung gusto mong maging bahagi ng aming team at mag-grow into a senior role!



Mabilis kaming nag-e-expand sa buong Europe — at naghahanap kami ng high-level executors na naiintindihan na ang creatives = revenue.



Hindi ito freelance gig.

Ito ay isang long-term position sa isang fast-growing performance team.



Kung gusto mo ng stability, growth, at tunay na responsibility — tuloy lang sa pagbabasa.



???? BAKIT IBA ANG ROLE NA ITO



• Full-time (6–8 oras/araw, 5–6 araw/linggo)

• Stable na buwanang income (walang guesswork, walang client hunting)

• Long-term growth sa loob ng kumpanya

• Daily work — walang idle time

• Direktang epekto sa ad performance (ang trabaho mo = results)



Hindi kami gumagawa ng freelancer pool.

Nagbuo kami ng core team ng operators.



???? ANG MAIN MISSION MO



Gagawa ka ng high-converting ad creatives para sa Meta 
/Instagram).



Hindi ito art. Hindi ito design para lang maganda.



Performance. Speed. Output. Accuracy.



? ANO ANG GAGAWIN MO ARAW-ARAW



• Mag-edit at mag-localize ng ad images (text, presyo, offers, names)

• I-adapt ang creatives para sa iba’t ibang markets (Sweden, Germany, NL/BE, Israel)

• Mag-edit ng videos (subtitles, pacing, cuts, hooks)

• Magpalit ng text sa images nang malinis at professional

• Siguraduhing match na match ang creatives sa funnel + offer



???? NEXT-LEVEL EXPECTATION (DITO NABABAGSAK ANG MARAMI)



Hindi lang kami naghahanap ng editor.



Gusto namin ng taong naiintindihan kung ano ang nagko-convert.



Dapat kaya mong:



• Mag-recreate ng winning ads gamit ang AI (image-to-image, variations, iterations)

• I-improve ang creatives ng competitors — hindi lang basta kopya

• Malaman kung kailan mag-upscale/enhance — at kung kailan hindi

• Maintindihan ang structure ng ecom ads (hooks, CTAs, angles)

• Makakita agad ng weak creatives at ma-fix ito



Bonus (malaking advantage):



• Mag-research ng winning ads sa market

• Maghanap ng bagong angles base sa product + buyer psychology

• Gumawa ng high-converting CTAs at ad variations

• Gumamit ng tools tulad ng Claude para sa copy at ideation

• Updated sa Meta ad trends at kung ano ang gumagana NGAYON



???? Kung obsessed ka sa “bakit gumagana ang ads” — mag-eexcel ka dito.



???? MGA TOOLS NA DAPAT KAYA MO



• Adobe (Photoshop, Premiere)

• CapCut

• AI tools (ElevenLabs, Freepik, Higgsfield, at iba pa)

• Marunong gumawa ng image/video prompts, storytelling, at mag-improve ng sariling AI prompting



Inaasahan namin ang bilis gamit ang tools + AI, hindi manual at mabagal na trabaho.



???? WORK STANDARD



• Mataas na daily output

• Mabilis na execution

• Malinis at simpleng edits (walang overdesign)

• Mahigpit na pagsunod sa templates at systems



Ito ay production at scale.



?? ATTENTION TO DETAIL (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Ang mali = nawawalang pera.



Kailangan mong laging i-check:



• Tamang language + localization

• Presyo, currency, offers

• Walang spelling mistakes

• Alignment, spacing, layout

• Malinis at professional na output



Kung hindi ka detail-oriented — hindi ito para sa’yo.



???? COMMUNICATION



• Mabilis sumagot

• Malinaw mag-update

• Nagtatanong kapag may hindi klaro



Mabilis ang galaw namin — dapat ganon ka rin.



???? COMPENSATION



• Start: $4–5/oras (full-time)

• Increase: $6–7–8/oras depende sa performance

• May bonuses para sa strong output



Stable income. Long-term growth.



???? GROWTH PATH



Kung mag-perform ka:



• Creative Lead

• Ad Creative Strategist

• Mas mataas na roles na may mas malaking responsibility



Nagpo-promote kami from within.



???? PARA KANINO ITO



Ikaw ay:



• Mabilis, sharp, at detail-focused

• Okay sa repetition + high output

• Interesado sa ecom, ads, at performance

• Gustong mag-improve at mag-grow

• Maaasahan — walang excuses

title: AI Workflow & Automation Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are a growing, family-run business supporting Australian operations through efficient systems, strong collaboration, and high-quality service delivery.



As part of our continued growth, we are integrating AI into our workflows to improve efficiency, communication, and overall business outcomes.



The Role



We are looking for an AI Workflow & Automation Specialist to design, build, and maintain practical AI systems that support daily operations and internal teams.

This is not a purely technical role — we are looking for someone who understands business workflows, not just tools.



You will help implement and optimise systems using tools such as:

n8n

OpenRouter

Claude (including Claude Co-Work)

Knowledge systems such as 1brain or similar

Design and build AI-powered workflows using n8n

Integrate AI models via OpenRouter

Use Claude to create practical, high-quality outputs 
s, documents, summaries, etc.)

Implement and manage a central knowledge base (e.g. 1brain)

Develop prompt structures and templates for different business use cases

Work closely with management to identify opportunities for automation

Support and train tea
mbers in using AI tools effectively

Continuously improve workflows based on real usage

Essential:

Experience with workflow automation tools (ideally n8n or similar)

Strong understanding of how to use AI tools in business environments

Experience working with APIs (basic to intermediate level)

Ability to translate business needs into simple, practical solutions

Strong problem-solving skills

Good written and verbal communication



Highly Desirable:

Experience using Claude, including Claude Co-Work

Experience with AI prompt engineering and optimisation

Familiarity with tools like Zapier, Make, or similar

Experience building knowledge bases or using vector databases

What Success Looks Like



Workflows are simple, reliable, and easy for the team to use

AI outputs are consistent and aligned with business standards

Tea
mbers are confident using AI in their daily tasks

Faster, higher-quality communication across the business

Continuous improvement of systems over time



Why Join Us

Work with a growing, forward-thinking business

Help shape how AI is used in a real-world environment

Opportunity to build and lead AI systems from the ground up



How to Apply

Please include:

A short summary of your experience with AI and automation

Examples of workflows or systems you have built

Tools you have used (e.g. n8n, OpenRouter, Claude, etc.)

A brief explanation of how you would use AI to improve team workflows

title: Executive Assistant & Operations Manager (Right-Hand to UK CEO)
description:
The Vision:

I am the founder of TyrEvo, a fast-growing automotive specialist business in Birmingham, UK. We are currently turning over £25k/month and are executing the Entrepreneurs Circle Masterplan to scale to £100k/month, including launching wheel alignment and mobile tyre fitting.



I need a high-level Executive Assistant and Operations Manager. You will be the central hub of the business—the "Integrator" to my "Visionary"—freeing my time to focus on scaling.



Your Role (The Gatekeeper & Operator):

You will be my right hand, doing a bit of everything to keep the business running like clockwork. You will coordinate between myself, our Shop Manager, and our external Digital Marketer.



Key Responsibilities:



Customer & Lead Management: Answer inbound calls and handle customer queries using Dialpad.



Systems Mastery: Operate and manage Tyresoft (our core management software). You need to be quick to learn and comfortable handling business-critical software.



The Central Liaison: Act as the bridge between me, the floor manager, and our digital marketing agency.



Executive Admin: Manage my diary, organize my inbox, and protect my time so I can focus on business growth.



Future Marketing Takeover: Currently, we have an expert running our Google, Meta, and TikTok ads. However, you must already possess a solid foundational knowledge of these platforms. Soon, our marketer will teach you our specific systems so you can take these over internally. You cannot be a complete beginner in digital marketing.



Required Experience & Persona:



Proven EA Experience: You have a background in assisting a Director, CEO, or business owner, with the qualifications and general business knowledge to match.



Exceptional Communication: Flawless English for handling UK customer calls and internal team communications.



Dedicated & Exclusive: This is a long-term role for someone looking for a career, not a side gig. You must have no other commitments or clients.



Working Hours (Strict):



8:00 AM to 6:00 PM (UK Time), Monday to Friday. * You must be fully available and responsive during these hours.



The Reward:



Competitive monthly salary based on experience for a full-time, dedicated role.



Direct involvement in scaling a business from £25k to £100k/month.



Long-term job security with a company that values your input and growth.



To Apply:

Please start your application with the word "TYREVO" so I know you read this entire post. Include a brief summary of your experience assisting a CEO, your familiarity with handling live customer calls, and your current understanding of digital ad platforms.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist
description:
*Senior PPC Manager*



About Us

We are Matt & Markus - Two experienced Online Marketing Experts with a combined 20+ years of PPC experience. We specialize in running high performing Google Ads campaigns. Additionally, we support clients with in depth data analysis and conversion optimization. 



We have been working independently as freelancers for many years and teamed up to build and grow our Google Ads agency in 2025. The agency is growing and with that growth we are building a strong team to be part of the journey.



About the Role

We are a growing performance marketing agency focused on delivering data-driven PPC campaigns for international clients. Our main expertise lies within Google Ads.

We are looking for a Senior PPC Manager with several (4+) years of experience with Google Ads to take ownership of our PPC accounts, drive growth, and operate with a high level of independence.

You will work closely with the founders while also owning execution, strategy, and performance across accounts.



Key Responsibilities

- Account Ownership & Performance

- Manage PPC accounts end-to-end across Google Ads (Search, Performance Max, Display, YouTube)

- Take full ownership of results (scaling volume, improving performance, driving growth)

- Identify and act on opportunities without needing constant direction

- Scaling & Strategy

- Scale campaigns efficiently while maintaining performance targets

- Allocate budgets based on performance trends and growth opportunities

- Build and refine account structures to support long-term scaling

- Data, Tracking & Insights



Work confidently with:

- GA4 (setup, analysis, debugging)

- Google Tag Manager (tracking setup, event tracking)

- Offline Conversion Tracking (OCT)

- Looker Studio dashboards (build and interpret)

- Turn data into clear, actionable insights that drive decisions



Testing & Optimisation

- Run structured testing plans (ads, bidding strategies, landing pages)

- Continuously improve CVR, CTR, and overall account efficiency

- Identify performance issues early and resolve them proactively



Client Communication

- Communicate directly with clients in a clear and confident manner

- Present performance updates and explain strategy in simple terms

- Build trust through ownership and results



Mentorship

- Support and mentor junior tea
mbers when needed

- Share knowledge and best practices to improve team performance



What We’re Looking For



Experience

- 4+ years hands-on PPC experience (primarily Google Ads)

- Agency or client-side experience required

- Proven ability to scale campaigns and drive growth

- Experience managing multiple accounts independently



Technical Skills

- Strong expertise in Google Ads.

- Solid understanding of:

- GA4 + GTM

- Conversion tracking and attribution

- Offline conversions

- Looker Studio



Mindset

- Highly proactive and accountable

- Strong problem solver who figures things out independently

- Commercially aware (focus on business outcomes, not just metrics)

- Comfortable making decisions without constant guidance



Important (Read Carefully)



We value:

- Ownership (and being able to take responsibility for wins and mistakes)

- Critical thinking (and being able to say “I see it different”)

- Clear communication when something is unclear (and being able to say “I don’t know”)

- Someone who enjoys life and is generally positive and can laugh while delivering high quality work



We are not looking for someone who:

- Relies heavily on AI tools without understanding the work

- Says they understand but does not ask questions when unsure





Working Setup

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Results are more important than a work schedule

- Small, high-performance team

- Focus on results, not micromanagement



Salary

Based on experience



What Success Looks Like

- Accounts are scaling in volume and revenue

- Performance opportunities are identified and acted on proactively

- Minimal hand-holding required



How to Apply



Please include:

- Your CV

- Written Summary of your PPC experience and where you see your personal strength

- Examples of accounts you’ve scaled (include results)

- Tools and platforms you’ve used

- Any other online marketing experience



We are looking forward to receive your application and to get to know you.



Best wishes,

Markus and Matt

title: Shopify Product Moderator & Lister for GMC Compliance
description:
We are an agency that helps eCommerce brands stay active on Google Merchant Center (GMC) so they can keep running Google Ads. We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to review and approve Shopify product listings before submission to Google. Your main goal is to ensure a consistent number of listings are submitted daily for each store, with every listing reviewed in around 4.5 minutes or less, while maintaining GMC compliance. Focus on spotting high-risk issues such as misleading claims, image/logo problems, or prohibited content across your assigned stores.



This role is ideal for someone with strong English comprehension and the ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues. It suits candidates who have experience creating Shopify product listings, especially those familiar with GMC requirements.



Responsibilities:

**Moderate and adjust client product listings across Shopify stores for GMC compliance issues (e.g., image logos, misleading claims, prohibited content); if unable to fix, log findings in the client’s Google Sheet, leave comments on issues, confirm fixes, and submit approved products to GMC.

**Report compliance risks with clear, actionable notes.

**Check the GMC dashboard across clients’ stores daily and resolve any flagged product-listing issues by updating the product in Shopify.

**Review and update product images (remove logos, improve main image appeal, source high-quality alternatives if needed).

**Refine and update clients' product listings when needed



Requirements:

**Ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues, this requires excellent English reading comprehension (to recognize compliance-sensitive wording).

**Proven experience as a product lister for Shopify

**Strong command of English with excellent written and verbal communication skills.

**Ability to manage multiple tasks with attention to detail and deadlines

**Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and the ability to work independently.

**Attention to detail: include the word “PINEAPPLE” when you apply to this role AND tell us how many questions are listed at the end of this job post

**Basic understanding of on-page SEO practices (incorporating provided keywords into descriptions)



Nice to Have:

**Any Google Merchant Center experience/You’ve created product listings for Google

**Have experience optimising product listings for Google Shopping

** Image editing such as text removal, image resizing and resolution upscaling



KPI: Audit and submit XY client product listings to Google Merchant Center per day on each store



How to Apply:



Please submit your resume along with samples of your previous work or portfolio. In your application please answer the following questions:



1) Do you have experience with Shopify?

2) Do you have experience with Simprosys?

3) Have you created product listings with GMC compliance in mind?

4) Do you have image editing experience (e.g., removing logos, text overlays, or improving image quality)? If yes, let us know what tools you use

5) Can you commit to 40 hours per week, Mon–Fri?

6) What is your WPM (words per minute) typing speed? Please obtain it from here:

title: Web & Digital Marketing Specialist (GoHighLevel + AI Tools)
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a skilled and reliable Web & Digital Marketing Specialist to support website development, creative design, and social media management. This role is focused on execution—building, optimizing, and maintaining digital assets that drive real business results.



You’ll be working closely with our team to create websites, improve online visibility, and implement systems using automation and AI tools.



Key Responsibilities

Build and maintain websites using GoHighLevel

Design and update landing pages, funnels, and website content

Optimize websites for SEO and emerging AI search (e.g., structured content, keyword strategy, schema basics)

Create and schedule social media content across platforms 
, Instagram, etc.)

Develop basic graphics and visual assets for marketing campaigns

Implement and manage automation workflows using AI tools

Monitor website performance and suggest improvements

Collaborate with team on marketing campaigns and content strategy



Required Qualifications

Proven experience with GoHighLevel (non-negotiable)

Strong understanding of SEO fundamentals (on-page SEO, keywords, metadata, site structure)

Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT or similar platforms

Experience building and editing websites and landing pages

Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Adobe, or similar tools)

Experience managing social media accounts for a business

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow systems/processes

Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

Experience optimizing content for AI-driven search (e.g., conversational content, featured snippets)

Familiarity with schema markup and structured data

Experience with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console)

Copywriting or content creation experience

Experience with automation workflows and CRM systems



What We’re Looking For

Someone who can execute quickly and accurately, not just generate ideas

Problem-solver who can figure things out without constant direction

Organized and process-driven

Comfortable working with evolving tools and AI systems

title: Long-Term Virtual Assistant for Auto Brokerage — Sheets, CRM, Canva, GoHighLevel (Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
READ THIS WHOLE POSTING BEFORE APPLYING

 

I'm hiring ONE person for a long-term role. I'm reading every single application carefully and I'll know within 30 seconds if you actually read this or just copy-pasted a generic reply. Put in the effort and you'll stand out from 90% of applicants.

 

================================================================

 

ABOUT MY BUSINESS

 

I run an auto brokerage in the United States. Here's exactly how it works so you understand what you'd be supporting:

 

A client comes to me looking for a specific car. I shop my network of dealerships to find them the best possible deal on that vehicle, negotiate the pricing, handle all the paperwork (financing docs, title, registration, etc.), and coordinate delivery of the car straight to the client's driveway. I'm the middleman that saves clients the headache of dealing with dealerships directly — and I get them a better deal than they'd ever get walking into a dealership on their own.

 

Dealers send me their inventory daily. At any given time I'm juggling 20-50 active deals at different stages:

 

- Fresh leads I'm shopping

- Mid-negotiation deals

- Deals in paperwork

- Cars pending delivery

- Closed/delivered deals

 

Every deal has a lot of moving pieces, which is why organization is everything in this business.

 

================================================================

 

WHY I'M HIRING

 

The business is growing and I'm spending too much time on backend admin work instead of doing what actually grows the business — talking to clients, negotiating with dealers, and closing deals.

 

I need someone reliable to take backend work off my plate so I can scale.

 

This role STARTS part-time. As you prove yourself trustworthy, detail-oriented, and consistent, hours and pay will grow with the clear goal of moving you into a full-time long-term role.

 

I am NOT looking for someone who wants a 3-month gig. I want to build with one person for years.

 

================================================================

 

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING DAY-TO-DAY

 

1) GOOGLE SHEETS — DEAL PIPELINE MANAGEMENT (YOUR MOST IMPORTANT TASK)

 

I keep all my active deals in Google Sheets and they get messy fast because deals change daily — new inventory comes in from dealers, prices update, clients change their minds, deals move stages, cars get delivered, etc.

 

Your job is to be the KEEPER of this sheet. That means:

 

- Logging new leads and deals as they come in

- Updating deal status as they progress (lead ? shopping ? negotiating ? paperwork ? delivery ? closed)

- Adding new dealer inventory to the sheet daily as dealers send it

- Removing or archiving sold/dead deals

- Keeping formatting consistent — no broken formulas, no random columns, no missing info

- Flagging anything that looks off so I can review

 

I need to be able to open my sheet at any 
nt and see exactly where every deal stands without confusion. If the sheet is messy, you're not doing your job.

 

2) CRM ORGANIZATION (GOHIGHLEVEL)

 

- Logging leads into GoHighLevel

- Building and maintaining lead follow-up sequences 
/SMS)

- Setting up and managing pipelines that mirror my Sheets pipeline

- Sending follow-ups to clients who went cold

- Dealership outreach campaigns 
/SMS to dealers for inventory or relationship building)

- Keeping CRM data clean and synced with the Sheets

 

3) CANVA — DAILY AD CREATION FOR INSTAGRAM

 

I post daily on Instagram to attract new clients. You'll be designing the creative:

 

- Car deal highlight posts

- "Just delivered" posts with happy clients

- Testimonial graphics

- Promotional ads / weekly specials

- Story content

 

I need someone who can take a photo of a car and a few details and turn it into a clean, scroll-stopping ad WITHOUT me having to art-direct every single one. Show me you have taste.

 

4) SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT

 

- Scheduling and posting daily Instagram content

- Writing captions in clean, natural English

- Engaging with comments and DMs in a basic way (I'll train you on how I want it handled)

- Light content planning — knowing what we're posting that week

 

5) GENERAL ADMIN AS NEEDED

 

Whatever else comes up — research, data entry, inbox organization, follow-ups, etc. As you prove yourself, I'll hand off more responsibility (and more pay).

 

================================================================

 

REQUIRED SKILLS (ALL MUST-HAVES — NO EXCEPTIONS)

 

- EXCELLENT ENGLISH — written and spoken, with a light/neutral accent. You may be on calls or sending voice messages with me, so this is critical.

 

- STRONG GOOGLE SHEETS SKILLS — formulas, conditional formatting, filters, sorting, data validation, keeping things visually clean and readable.

 

- CRM EXPERIENCE — ideally GoHighLevel, but solid HubSpot/Zoho/Pipedrive experience works if you can learn fast.

 

- GOHIGHLEVEL — workflows, pipelines, automations, follow-up sequences. If you don't have this yet, be HONEST about it in your application and tell me you're willing to learn fast on your own time.

 

- CANVA — confident designing ads independently, strong visual taste, can create branded content consistently without hand-holding.

 

- INSTAGRAM MANAGEMENT — scheduling, captions, basic engagement.

 

- OBSESSIVE ATTENTION TO DETAIL — this is the #1 trait I'm looking for. In a deal pipeline, one wrong number or missed update can cost real money. If you describe yourself as "pretty organized," this isn't the role for you.

 

================================================================

 

BONUS SKILLS (NICE TO HAVE — NOT REQUIRED)

 

- Experience in automotive, real estate, or other deal-based industries

- Video editing (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

- Copywriting for ads/captions

- Experience with Zapier or other automation tools

- Cold
 / cold SMS experience

 

================================================================

 

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR (PERSONALITY FIT)

 

- Wants a long-term home with ONE employer — not a side gig stacker

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged

- Communicates proactively — tells me when something's unclear, behind, or broken BEFORE I have to ask

- Treats my business like it's their own

- Honest about what they don't know yet

- Reliable on schedule and deadlines

- Drama-free and professional

 

================================================================

 

HOURS, PAY & SCHEDULE

 

This role starts PART-TIME. In your application, you must tell me:

 

- Your proposed monthly rate in USD

- How many hours per week that covers

- Your available working hours in Philippine Time (PHT)

- Whether you can overlap with US hours (Eastern or Pacific) when needed

 

As you prove yourself over the first 1-3 months, both hours and pay will grow with the goal of full-time.

 

================================================================

 

HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

 

** To prove you actually read this entire posting, START YOUR REPLY WITH THE WORD "PIPELINE" AT THE VERY TOP. **

 

** Any application that does not start with the word "PIPELINE" goes straight to trash. No exceptions. **

 

After "PIPELINE" at the top, your application must include ALL of the following:

 

1) SHORT INTRO

Who you are, where you're based in the Philippines, and your VA experience overall.

 

2) SKILL BREAKDOWN

For each required skill below, give me your honest experience level (1-10) and a brief real example of how you've used it:

- Google Sheets

- CRM (which one)

- GoHighLevel

- Canva

- Instagram management

 

3) CANVA PORTFOLIO

Links or screenshots of ads/social posts you've personally designed. If you don't have automotive examples, that's fine — just show me your best work. Pinterest boards or generic templates don't count.

 

4) VOICE RECORDING (REQUIRED — NOT OPTIONAL)

A 60-second Loom, Vocaroo, or audio recording in English. Introduce yourself and tell me why you'd be a good fit. I need to hear how you actually speak. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

 

5) RATE + HOURS

- Proposed monthly rate (USD)

- Weekly hours that covers

- Your PHT working hours

- US time zone overlap availability

 

6) WHY LONG-TERM?

Tell me honestly why you're looking for a long-term role and what you want out of the next few years of your career.

 

================================================================

 

FINAL NOTE

 

I'm building something real and I want to find the right person to build it with me. If that's you, take 30-45 minutes on this application and do it right. The person who gets this role will have a stable income, growing pay, and a real long-term home.

 

I'll be reviewing applications for the next 7 days and will respond to the strongest candidates first.

 

Looking forward to meeting you.

title: Senior Creative (Branding and Key Visual Lead)
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Creative who can lead both ideas and people. This role owns the development of strong, scalable Key Visuals (KV) and brand direction across campaigns, while also guiding a team of creatives to deliver consistent, high-quality output.



You’re not just executing—you’re setting the standard, shaping the brand, and making sure the team delivers work that performs.



Key Responsibilities



Lead concept development for campaigns, content, and brand initiatives

Own the end-to-end development of Key Visuals (KV) that define each campaign and scale across:



   
 marketing



   -E-commerce (homepage, PDPs, collections)



   -Social (organic + content series)



Paid ads (Meta, TikTok, display)



   -Establish and evolve brand visual identity systems, ensuring consistency and recognizability



   -Translate brand strategy into strong, distinctive visual directions—not trend-chasing



   -Build scalable KV systems for high-volume, multi-platform execution



Creative Leadership & Management



   -Manage and mentor designers, junior creatives, and freelancers



   -Provide clear creative direction, feedback, and approvals across all outputs



   -Review work regularly to ensure quality, consistency, and alignment with brand and performance goals



   -Allocate tasks and manage workloads to keep projects on track



   -Identify gaps in skills or output and proactively raise the team’s standard



   -Collaborate cross-functionally with marketing, performance, and production teams



   -Present and defend creative work to stakeholders with clarity and confidence



Requirements



   -5+ years experience in a creative role, with team leadership or management experience



   -Strong portfolio demonstrating branding expertise and key visual development



   -Proven ability to lead campaigns from concept to execution across multiple channels



   -Experience managing or mentoring creatives in a fast-paced environment



   -Strong understanding of design systems, layout, typography, and visual storytelling



   -Ability to balance brand-building with performance-driven creative



   -Strong communication, presentation, and decision-making skills



   -Proficiency in Adobe CC, Figma, or similar tools



If you are interested, please apply through our website only: 
-(branding-and-key-visual-lead).



Applicants who do not complete their application through our website will not be entertained.

title: Cost Estimator (Construction/Demolition)
description:
Join Binners – a fast-growing construction services company in Toronto, Canada.



Binners provides demolition, bin rentals, waste removal, and construction support services across the Greater Toronto Area. Reliability is our brand, and strong estimating is critical to ensuring our projects are profitable, well-executed, and set up for success from day one.



If you’re analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in construction estimating, we want you on our team.



About the Role

As a Demolition Estimator, you will be responsible for reviewing project scopes, performing takeoffs, and building accurate, profitable estimates for demolition and related services.

You will work closely with sales and operations to ensure every job is priced correctly, clearly scoped, and aligned with execution in the field.

This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, working Toronto business hours.



Responsibilities

-- Reviewing drawings, photos, and project details to understand full scope of work

-- Performing quantity takeoffs for demolition projects

-- Building detailed cost estimates including labour, equipment, disposal, and materials

-- Ensuring all estimates meet target margins and profitability goals

-- Identifying risks, missing scope, and potential cost issues before quoting

-- Clearly defining scope inclusions, exclusions, and assumptions

-- Coordinating with sales to finalize pricing and submit quotes

-- Supporting operations with clear job handoffs and documentation

-- Comparing estimated vs actual job performance to improve future accuracy

-- Continuously improving estimating templates, pricing models, and processes



Requirements

-- Experience in construction estimating (demolition experience strongly preferred)

-- Strong understanding of construction or demolition workflows

-- Ability to read drawings, plans, and project scopes

-- Strong analytical and numerical skills

-- Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

-- High attention to detail and accuracy

-- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-- Ability to work independently and make decisions

-- Organized and process-driven mindset

-- Stable internet connection, reliable computer, and quiet workspace

-- Willing to work Toronto timezone hours



Nice to Have

-- Experience estimating demolition, waste removal, or site services

-- Familiarity with construction drawings, blueprints, and takeoff tools

-- Familiarity with AutoCAD

-- Experience with estimating or project management software

-- Understanding of disposal costs, labour productivity, and job costing

title: Senior Real Estate Appointment Setter
description:
PLEASE READ EVERYTHING! 



About Us:

We are FASTEST CASH HOMEBUYERS, a U.S.-based real estate investment company that buys houses directly from homeowners and then fix and flip them to make a profit. We generate warm inbound leads daily from ads — meaning you will be talking to motivated homeowners, not cold-calling strangers. We are looking for a reliable and growth minded tea
mber to grow in the company. 



TASKS & RESPONSIBILITIES

We are looking for a fluent-English speaking Communication Specialist who can:

Answer calls fast – pick up inbound calls within seconds of it ringing (speed-to-lead).

Call new leads quickly – call online form submissions within seconds (speed-to-lead).

Qualify leads (3–10 mins) – ask screening questions, confirm address, and gather a few details to then set an appointment.

Set appointments for homeowners with our Home Buying Specialist/Closer – transfer leads live if the closer is available, or book them a time on the calendar if closer is unavailable.

REMINDERS: Follow up by call/text/email – make sure sellers show up to scheduled appointments. Reduce no-shows.

Call the seller you set after they sign a contract to sell their house and congratulate them. (3–10 mins)

Update CRM after every call – log conversations, notes, tags, and next steps.

Update Excel Tracking and KPI sheets: (leads received, calls answered, appointments set, contracts signed, buyers contacted, deals sold).





Compensation Structure:

$3 / hour Base plus Weekly Bonus Opportunities. 

Performance Bonus and Incentives: Get paid $
+ bonus per closed contracts that you directly help generate (via calling, setting an appointment, CRM follow-ups, lead management, and coordination) depending how much help you provide. 



Estimated Monthly Earnings:

Base Only (no deals): $480/month

Base + 2 Deals Closed: ~$680–$1,080/month

Base + 4 Deals Closed (Goal Hit): ~$880–$1,680/month

Top Performer (5–6 Deals): ~$980–$2,280/month



Hours:

10:30AM to 6:30PM EST (New York Time)

Availability to take inbound calls and make outbound calls within seconds is KEY. 



We have warm/hot inbound leads coming into our system daily and an opportunity for you to start earning bonuses from the start. 



Requirements:

Speak and Write Fluent English (neutral accent, confident speaking voice)

Reliable internet 

Webcam 

Quiet workspace

Available full-time (40 hrs/week) so you can answer calls quickly — no other clients preferred

Ability to Implement Feedback Fast 

Experience using a CRM (preferably GoHighLevel) 

Experienced with using Excel sheets 

Fast response time (calls and texts must be made and answered quickly within seconds)

Good at talking to people 

2+ years Experience in sales, real estate wholesaling, as a receptionist or customer service is a plus but not required.



Provided:

Weekly instructions and training (4-5x a week)

Scripts 

Access to our CRM and dialer

Access to Slack

Bonus pay opportunities every week

Opportunity to grow in the company no matter where you start



VISION:

We are looking to hire someone long-term who is driven, self-accountable, and coachable. Our goal is to give you all the tools, training, and support you need to master your role and then grow into higher positions within the company — from Communications Specialist and Appointment Setting to Manager and more. 

If you are a motivated and ambitious person, this is an incredible opportunity to work directly with an experienced real estate investor and build a long-term career.



Our Core Values are:

-SPEED IS KING AND THE FASTEST PERSON WINS

-OPEN COMMUNICATION AND HONEST FEEDBACK 

-IMPROVE AND GET BETTER EVERYDAY

-IF YOU HIT YOUR KPIS, YOU WILL HIT YOUR GOALS



If You Feel You Are Right for The Job, please respond with the following to be considered:

-Reply to this job post with a video or voice recording of you talking. 

-Reply to this job post with a link to your resume

-Include the answer to: “What is your favorite movie?”

-Include the word "Persevere" in your response. Why? This lets us see who is actually paying attention.



Looking forward to hearing from you. Hope to work together soon.

title: Financial Accountant (Dutch GAAP Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled, licensed CPA to manage the end-to-end accounting and financial reporting for a Dutch Fiscal Unity consisting of four entities. You will be responsible for ensuring that the administration is "audit-ready" or "compilation-ready", managing complex intercompany reconciliations, and ensuring full compliance with Dutch accounting standards.



Key Responsibilities

Full Cycle Accounting: Manage the daily/monthly bookkeeping and financial processing for all four entities within the fiscal unity.



Year-End File Preparation: Prepare high-quality working papers and lead the preparation of the annual accounts to create the financial statements according to Dutch GAAP.



Fiscal Unity Management: Handle complex intercompany transactions, eliminations, and corrections within the fiscal unity structure.



Compliance & Corrections: Perform period-end closing procedures, including VAT reconciliations and necessary journal corrections.



Software Management: Maintain the administration within Exact Online, ensuring optimal use of the system's features.



Audit/Tax Readiness: Serve as the primary point of contact for the external tax advisor or auditor, providing all necessary documentation for Corporate Income Tax (VPB) filings.



Required Qualifications & Skills

Licensure: Active CPA or equivalent international certification.



Dutch Expertise: Proven experience with Dutch GAAP and the Dutch fiscal landscape.



Software: Proficiency in Exact Online (
)  is necessary to complete this project.



Experience: At least 5+ years of experience in complex accounting environments, preferably having worked with holding structures or fiscal unities.



Language: Professional fluency in English; the ability to read Dutch financial terminology and legal documents is a significant advantage. (AI translations & usage allowed)



Analytical Rigor: Strong attention to detail regarding intercompany balances and corrections.



If the project is completed, it is possible to get a full-time job with us.

title: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist
description:
About The Ad Firm



The Ad Firm is a US-based, performance-driven digital marketing agency recognized for delivering measurable ROI through transparent strategies and proven results since 2009. We partner with businesses across industries to grow visibility, traffic, and revenue through precision-built campaigns.



Job Description



We’re hiring a CRO professional with advanced GA4 expertise. You’ll lead testing and optimization efforts while managing client analytics setups, conversion tracking, and reporting. This role combines analytical precision with creative problem-solving, requiring a strong command of digital analytics.



This is a part-time / project-based opportunity with the potential to become full-time in the future. 



Key Responsibilities



- Conduct conversion audits and develop testing roadmaps

- Plan and execute A/B and multivariate tests (Google Optimize, VWO, Optimizely, etc.)

- Set up and manage client GA4 properties, conversion events, and reports

- Build dashboards and analyze data to identify growth opportunities

- Collaborate with PPC, SEO, and design teams to improve campaign performance

- Translate findings into actionable insights for clients and internal teams



Required Qualifications



- 3+ years of CRO and analytics experience, preferably in an agency setting

- Expert-level knowledge of GA4 (certification strongly preferred)

- Experience setting up conversion tracking and event-based reporting

- Skilled in Hotjar, Tag Manager, Looker Studio, and related tools

- Strong grasp of UX, data interpretation, and funnel optimization

- Proven track record of improving conversion rates through testing and analytics



Why Join Us



- Work with a diverse range of clients and industries.

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused agency culture.

- Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.

- Professional development support and SEO tool access.

- Flexible remote work options.

- 2 weeks Paid Time-Off

- Paid Sick Leave

- 8 Paid Holidays

- Health Insurance



How to Apply:



We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

title: Senior Web Developer
description:
Job Description





The Ad Firm is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Southern California, serving clients nationwide. Since 2009, we’ve helped businesses grow through SEO, content, and performance-driven digital strategies.



We’re expanding our team and looking for a Senior Web Developer to lead how our websites are built from the ground up. This is not a production role. This is a systems-level engineering role for someone who understands that websites are not just design deliverables, they are performance assets that need to rank, scale, and hold up under real-world conditions.



This is a remote position with flexible working hours from day one.





About the Role



Own the technical foundation of the websites we build

Architect, develop, and optimize custom builds for SEO, performance, and scalability

Work closely with SEO, Content, and Digital PR teams to ensure strong technical execution

Build systems that are clean, scalable, and maintainable

Focus on engineering quality over page builders or pre-built themes



Key Responsibilities



Architect and build fully custom WordPress websites (themes, plugins, ACF-driven structures)

Engineer sites for speed, scalability, and strong Core Web Vitals performance

Handle server environments, deployments, and infrastructure decisions

Integrate APIs and third-party systems cleanly and reliably

Own technical SEO implementation (crawlability, indexation, structured data)

Manage DNS, CDN (Cloudflare), SMTP, and hosting configurations

Work across Shopify and BigCommerce at the code level when needed

Implement accurate tracking (GA4, GTM) without compromising data integrity

Debug issues across the full stack (server, backend, frontend performance)



What We’re Looking For



5+ years of web development experience in agency or performance-driven environments

Deep expertise in PHP (including WordPress core-level development)

Strong JavaScript experience with modern frameworks and tooling

Working knowledge of Python (automation, scraping, tooling)

Proven experience building custom WordPress websites from scratch

Strong understanding of technical SEO and its impact on architecture and performance

Ability to diagnose and solve full-stack issues independently



What Sets You Apart



You think in systems, not pages

Experience working on large-scale or SEO-heavy websites

Strong understanding of crawlability, indexation, and internal linking at scale

Experience with schema and structured data implementation

Exposure to programmatic SEO or dynamic page generation

Experience handling real-world constraints (traffic spikes, broken deployments, legacy rebuilds)



Strong Advantages



Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Git workflows

Familiarity with Docker or modern dev environments

Experience with log analysis and advanced debugging

Security hardening and site recovery experience

Experience with multi-site or multi-location SEO builds



What We Don’t Want



Heavy reliance on page builders

Plugin-first approaches to performance and SEO

Developers who need constant direction or step-by-step instructions



Why Join Us?



High ownership with real technical decision-making

Clean builds with no unnecessary bloat

Direct collaboration with SEO, Content, and Digital PR specialists

A team that values performance, scalability, and engineering quality

Competitive salary and performance-based incentives

Flexible remote work from day one

2 weeks Paid Time-Off

Paid Sick Leave

8 Paid Holidays

Health Insurance



Ready to Apply?



Submit your resume

Include a portfolio with examples of custom builds

Add a short note on how you approach building high-performance websites



How to Apply:



We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
The Ad Firm is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Southern California, catering to clients nationwide. Since 2009, we have been a digital marketing agency that consistently helps our clients' companies grow online.



We're expanding our team and seeking a Marketing Manager to own and execute marketing for The Ad Firm itself — not client projects. This person will be the internal marketing lead, responsible for how the agency shows up in the market and for generating our own pipeline. 



To be eligible for this role, you must have experience working at a marketing agency and possess a minimum of three years of experience managing in-house or agency marketing functions. The Ad Firm is offering a remote position with flexible working hours from day one.





About the Role

As our Marketing Manager, you'll be the person behind how The Ad Firm presents itself to the world. You'll own our brand, website, content, and SEO/GEO presence, and you'll lead demand generation efforts that bring qualified prospects into our sales pipeline. 



You'll work closely with our SEO, Digital PR, Content, and Paid Media teams — the same specialists who deliver for clients — and turn their expertise into marketing that wins us new business. 



This is a senior role that is ideal for someone who wants the autonomy of owning a full marketing function without the context-switching of client work, and who gets genuinely excited about positioning an agency in a crowded space.





Key Responsibilities

- Own The Ad Firm's brand positioning, messaging, and voice across every touchpoint

- Manage and optimize 
 — content, SEO, GEO (AI search visibility), and conversion performance

- Plan and execute the content calendar for TAF (blog, case studies, thought leadership, service pages)

- Lead demand generation programs that produce qualified sales conversations

- Coordinate with internal SEO, Digital PR, and Content teams to apply agency capabilities to our own marketing

- Develop and maintain sales enablement assets — case studies, one-pagers, proposal support materials

- Track marketing performance and report on pipeline contribution, traffic, and brand metrics

- Stay close to agency industry trends, competitor positioning, and buyer behavior shifts



What We're Looking For

- 3–5 years of marketing experience, with at least some of it in a digital marketing agency setting

- Track record of owning a marketing function end-to-end, not just executing pieces of one

- Strong command of SEO and content marketing fundamentals (GEO / AI search knowledge is a plus)

- Proven ability to generate pipeline through organic channels

- Sharp writing skills and a good instinct for positioning and messaging

- Comfortable working across brand, website, content, and demand gen without needing a big team

- Self-directed, strategic, and execution-oriented in equal measure

- Paid media and
 marketing experience is a plus



Why Join Us?

- Own a full marketing function with real autonomy — no client context-switching

- Direct access to senior SEO, Digital PR, and Content specialists to support your work

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused agency culture

- Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

- Support for professional growth and access to top industry tools

- Flexible remote work options from day one

- 2 weeks Paid Time-Off

- Paid Sick Leave

- 8 Paid Holidays

- Health Insurance



Ready to Apply?

If you're ready to own how an agency markets itself and you want the space to do it well, we want to hear from you. Submit your resume, a portfolio or examples of marketing work you've led, and a brief note on why you're the perfect fit.



How to Apply:

We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

6+ MONTHS OF UEFN / Unreal Engine EXPERIENCE REQUIRED



IMPORTANT – Fixed Requirements

Previous experience leading or coordinating small teams

Work Setup

Remote

Part-time

Long-term opportunity for strong performers

Your UEFN / Unreal Engine experience (minimum 6 months)

TYPE: “I follow workflows fast and with minimal errors” in your application

title: Video Editor / Content Manager (YouTube Long Form + Shorts Distribution)
description:
Video Editor / Content Operator (YouTube + Shorts)



About Us

We are a real estate investment and media company building a high-output content machine that drives leads, conversations, and real estate deals.

This is not entertainment editing.

You will be working with real sales calls, real deal breakdowns, talking head education videos and real acquisition strategy—content that directly impacts revenue.

You’ll work within a structured team using SOPs, templates, and clear workflows.

We are looking for someone who can execute quickly, consistently, and at volume within a proven system.



Compensation

Earning Potential: $480/month to $1,500+ per month

Base Pay: ~$3/hour (~$480/month minimum output)

Performance Pay: Based on output consistency and volume

Higher output = higher earnings (no cap for top performers)

Above Average Production Earnings: $650–$1,000+ per month for consistent, above-average performers

Top Performers: Can exceed this range (no cap)

Structure:

Base pay + performance bonuses 

Higher content output and quality consistency = higher earnings

Paid biweekly via Wise. 



Expected Availability

Must operate on Eastern Time (New York)

Daily availability required

Fast response times during working hours expected



Core Responsibilities & KPIs

Long-Form Editing

3–5 videos per week

30–180 minutes per video

Turnaround: 24–48 hours

Clean, very simple edits (no heavy effects)

Short-Form Clips

3–10 clips per long-form video

Posting & Distribution

Upload/schedule to YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok

Titles, templates, and SOPs provided

Accuracy

Remove/blur sensitive information (names, phone numbers, addresses)



Communication Expectations

This is a team-based role, not freelance isolation.

You must:

Provide consistent updates 

Communicate blockers immediately

Respond quickly during work hours

Follow SOP-driven workflows

Ensure edited videos are being posted every week



Who This Is For

Fast, efficient long-form video editors

Detail-oriented and deadline-driven

Comfortable with high-volume output

Able to follow structured systems closely

Seeking long-term stable work with growth potential



Not For

Missed deadlines or inconsistent availability

Slow responders

Overly complex or over-edited workflows

Editors juggling multiple clients

Low attention to detail



Tools

Must be comfortable with:

CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or InShot

Must be able to:

Clean jump cuts and pacing edits

Remove filler/silence

Blur sensitive info accurately

Extract short-form clips

Add basic captions/transitions

Organize files properly



Growth Path

Editor ? Content Operator ? Team Leader ? Head of Media

Top performers may grow into higher responsibility roles within 6–12 months based on performance with increased compensation tied to output and impact.

You’ll gain exposure to:

Sales calls and acquisition strategy

Deal structuring

Content-driven client acquisition



Values

We operate as a faith-driven business and value:

Integrity

Discipline

Stewardship

Service through work

Helping others

Alignment matters more than perfection.



HOW TO APPLY:

Send or Submit the links to examples of your work:

2–4 long-form editing samples

2–3 short-form clips



Then answer briefly:

What software do you use to edit?

How fast can you deliver a 30–60 min video?

How many clips can you make per long-form video?   

Include the word at the top of your response:

CONSISTENT



IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED

 

We are hiring 1–3 people only asap. We are reviewing applications immediately and will close the role once filled. This is a high-output role with real growth upside for consistent performers, but it requires discipline, speed, and consistency. 



If you want to: 

Increase your income over time

Build real skills 

Be part of a team executing at a high level 



APPLY NOW!

title: Real Estate Investor VA– Outbound Cold Caller (Probate & Motivated Sellers)
description:
IMPORTANT: This is a full-time, dedicated position. Do not apply if you are currently working for other clients.

Interviews on Sunday. This job is from Noon - 7 PM EST, aka 12-7 am phillpine time. However, I'm flexible. I let my guys finish the day between 9-6 pm. As long as it's within those hours and we often offer overtime. 



We are a real estate investment company based in Jacksonville, FL (
) looking for a full-time Virtual Assistant to handle outbound calling to motivated sellers and probate heirs. This is a performance-driven role with real earning potential beyond your base hourly rate. This Jjob requires skip tracing and verifying leads while calling. 



You MUST be available during Eastern Standard Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, Monday–Friday).



Responsibilities:

- Outbound calls to motivated sellers and probate heirs using Kixie dialer

- Skip trace leads to find accurate contact information

- Follow up with leads via phone, SMS, and
 inside REI Reply

- Update lead statuses and notes in the CRM after every interaction

- Book seller appointments and manage pipeline

- Report daily call activity and outcomes



Requirements:

- Experience using Kixie dialer (preferred)

- Experience using REI Reply (also known as Go High Level / GHL) or similar CRM (preferred)

- General CRM experience expected

- Excellent spoken English — clear, professional, and confident on the phone

- Probate or real estate investing experience is a MAJOR plus

- Available EST business hours, full time

- Stable internet connection and quiet work environment

- This must be your primary or only job



Compensation:

- Base pay: $4–$6/hr based on experience

- $100 bonus per closed deal on any lead you generated

- Performance bonuses for appointments set

- Hourly rate increases with proven performance



This role rewards people who show up, work hard, and produce results. If you are looking for a long-term position where your income grows with your performance, this is it. If you can perform at a high level then this is the job for you. A good closer can easily make 3-5 sales a smonth. 



This position requires the use of Hubstaff time tracking software, which includes random screenshots and activity monitoring throughout your shift. You must be comfortable being monitored while working. If you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply.



To apply, please respond with:

1. A voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your calling and CRM experience

2. How many current clients/employers you have

3. Your experience with probate, real estate investing, or motivated seller calls

4. In your own words, why you would be a perfect fit for this role

5. Your availability to start

title: DESIGNER
description:
We're hiring for APK VISUALS, a YouTube media company managing multiple faceless channels across TV, Animation, History, and News.



We're currently looking for talented Thumbnail Designers to create high-click, attention-grabbing thumbnails.



Responsibilities:

• Design compelling YouTube thumbnails for long-form content

• Work with video topics, scripts, and briefs to visualize strong concepts

• Use color, composition, and typography to maximize CTR

• Adapt design style to match different channel branding and audiences

• Collaborate with editors, writers, and channel managers

• Follow channel-specific guidelines and Standard Operating Procedures

• Deliver consistently and meet deadlines



Requirements (Flexible):

• Proficiency in Photoshop

• Ability to use basic image generation tools for concept creation

• Strong understanding of visual hierarchy, contrast, and composition

• Ability to work with different niches and design styles

• Knowledge of YouTube thumbnail psychology and viewer behavior

• Reliable, organized, and able to follow detailed briefs and guidelines

• Willingness to learn, adapt, and grow within the role

• Previous YouTube thumbnail experience is a plus but not required



You will receive an
 if you make it to the next round of the job.

title: Domain Acquisition & Monetization Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated Domain Acquisition & Monetization Specialist to source, evaluate, acquire, and monetize high-value domain names.



The ideal candidate has strong experience in domain investing, digital asset valuation, SEO-driven domain analysis, and online deal negotiation.



You will play a key role in identifying profitable domain opportunities, executing acquisitions, and maximizing revenue through resale, leasing, parking, or strategic asset utilization.



Responsibilities:

Research and identify high-value domain name opportunities

Evaluate domain value based on branding potential, keyword strength, SEO authority, and resale demand

Identify and acquire expired domains with strong backlink profiles and SEO metrics

Analyze backlink quality, domain authority, and market trends to ensure acquisition profitability

Execute domain purchases and negotiate deals with sellers, brokers, and marketplaces

Manage and grow a domain investment portfolio

Develop and execute monetization strategies (flipping, leasing, parking, resale, redirects)

Track acquisition costs, performance, and ROI

Coordinate with domain marketplaces such as GoDaddy Auctions, Sedo, Namecheap, and others

Proven experience in domain acquisition, domain flipping, or digital asset investing

Strong understanding of domain valuation (brandability, keywords, SEO metrics, demand)

Experience using domain marketplaces and auction platforms

Strong negotiation and analytical skills

Ability to identify undervalued or high-potential digital assets

Self-driven, detail-oriented, and results-focused



Preferred Skills:

SEO and backlink analysis knowledge

Experience with affiliate sites or digital properties

Background in digital marketing or web asset investing

Strong research and trend analysis skills



Work Setup:

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



How to Apply:

Please submit:



Updated resume

Brief experience in domain acquisition or digital asset investing
