title: Wholesale Real Estate Lead Manager - SMS, Lists, CRM (US Hours, Long-Term)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY:

I'm AJ Anderson, a real estate wholesaler in Jacksonville, Florida. I help homeowners sell their houses fast for cash by connecting them with my network of investors. I'm building a lean team and looking for ONE rockstar VA to be my right hand. This is a long-term role — I want someone to grow with me, not a one-off project.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

You'll be my Lead Manager. Your job is to fill my pipeline with qualified motivated-seller leads so I can focus on closing deals. You'll handle list building, skip tracing, SMS campaigns, CRM management, and buyer outreach. When you find a hot lead, you tag me and I take the call. We work as a team — you generate the opportunities, I close them, we both win.



WHAT YOU'LL DO DAILY:



1. LIST BUILDING (3 hrs/week)

   Pull motivated-seller lead lists in PropStream using exact filters I provide. Rotate through 5 Jacksonville zip codes weekly. Quality check each list before exporting.



2. SKIP TRACING (2 hrs/week)

   Use PropStream's built-in skip tracing to find phone numbers for property owners. Clean lists by removing leads with no phone numbers, duplicates, and DNC flags.



3. SMS CAMPAIGNS (3 hrs/week)

   Send
outbound SMS messages daily using approved scripts in Smarter Contact. Compliance with TCPA rules and our daily volume caps is mandatory.



4. SMS REPLY MANAGEMENT (3 hrs/week)

   Respond to text replies using approved response scripts. Qualify interested sellers by asking key questions. Tag me immediately in Slack when someone is HOT (motivated, gave a price, vacant property, etc.).



5. CRM LOGGING (1 hr/week)

   Log every lead and conversation in our Trello board. Move cards through pipeline columns as status changes. No lead falls through the cracks on your watch.



6. BUYER OUTREACH (2 hrs/week)

   Send
 
 to flippers, landlords, and investors in Jacksonville real estate groups. Build our cash-buyer database. Use approved scripts.



7. DAILY REPORTING (~30 min/week)

   Send a complete end-of-shift report in Slack using a specific format I'll provide. I should be able to read one message and know exactly what happened today.



PAY:

- $5/hour starting, 10-15 hours per week ($
/month)

- Raises every 90 days based on performance

- Full-time hours available within 60 days for the right person

- PERFORMANCE BONUSES:

  ? $50 per hot lead that becomes a signed contract

  ? $250 per deal that closes from your work

  ? Top performers earn an extra $
/month in bonuses



HOURS:

10-15 hours per week to start. You must be available consistently between 9am-3pm EST (US East Coast morning hours). This is non-negotiable because we work with US homeowners and most replies come during US business hours.



WHO YOU ARE:

- You want a long-term position, not a quick gig

- You're proactive — you suggest improvements instead of waiting to be told

- You communicate clearly and respond fast in Slack

- You take ownership of your work and don't need micromanaging

- You're hungry to learn real estate and grow into a senior role

- You're honest — you tell me when something didn't work, not just when it did



WHAT I PROVIDE:

- Complete training (written SOPs + Loom video walkthroughs)

- All tools (PropStream, Smarter Contact, Trello, Slack accounts)

- Approved scripts for SMS and replies (you don't have to invent anything)

- Ongoing coaching — I'm available daily in Slack for questions

- Performance bonuses tied to outcomes (your work directly translates to your pay)

- Long-term growth path as the business scales



WHAT I EXPECT:

- Consistency. If you commit to 9am-3pm EST, I expect you online.

- Honesty. Mistakes happen — tell me, we fix it. Hide a mistake = immediate termination.

- Communication. I'd rather get 10 questions than 1 wrong assumption.

- Quality. Sloppy lists, unclean data, or careless texts cost me real money. Detail matters.

- Coachability. I'll give feedback. You apply it. We get better.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Excellent written English (texts must sound natural and warm, not robotic)

- Reliable internet (10mbps minimum) with a backup plan for outages

- Quiet professional workspace

- Available consistently 9am-3pm EST

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Coachable and proactive

- Long-term mindset



Real estate experience is NOT required. I will train you on everything.



BONUS POINTS FOR:

- Experience with PropStream, BatchLeads, REIPro, or DealMachine

- Experience with SMS tools (Smarter Contact, Lead Sherpa, Launch Control)

- Sales, telemarketing, or customer service background

- Familiarity with Trello, Slack, and Google Sheets

- Real estate or US market knowledge



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):

Send a reply that includes ALL 5 of these items:



1. A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English. Use 
 (free) and paste the link in your reply.



2. Your typing speed result from 
 (screenshot showing your WPM).



3. Your internet speed test result from speedtest.net (screenshot showing download/upload).



4. Confirm in writing that you can work 9am-3pm EST consistently.



5. Tell me ONE specific thing about Jacksonville, Florida. This proves you actually read this post and didn't copy-paste a generic application.



Applications missing ANY of these 5 items will be automatically rejected. This is intentional — it tests your attention to detail, which is the single most important skill for this role.



TIMELINE:

- Hiring decision within 5 days of post going live

- Top 2 candidates do a paid trial week ($50 flat)

- Long-term hire after trial week

- Performance review and raise consideration every 90 days



I'm looking forward to meeting you.



— AJ

title: Creative Growth Marketer
description:
We're a small team building a skincare brand from the ground up, and we're looking for a marketer to help us go from 0 to 1. This is a hands on role for someone genuinely curious about marketing who wants real experience across branding, content, and growth.

 

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

 

You'll work directly with a small team to shape how our brand looks, sounds, and grows. Expect a lot of experimentation. Some things will land, some won't, and the goal is to learn fast and keep iterating. If you enjoy testing ideas and figuring out what resonates with real audiences, you'll fit in well here.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

- Help shape brand identity, voice, and visual direction

- Design assets for social, web, and product using AI tools and standard design platforms

- Plan and create content across multiple platforms

- Run growth experiments and track what's actually working

- Spot trends early and move on them quickly

 

 

PLATFORMS AND TOOLS YOU'LL GET EXPOSURE TO

 

- TikTok

- Instagram

- Pinterest

-
 / X

- LinkedIn

- AI design tools

 

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

- Taste. You have an eye for what looks good and what feels off, even if you can't always articulate why.

- Attention to detail. Typos, broken links, misaligned graphics, off brand colors, you catch them.

- A genuine desire to grow. You ask questions, take feedback well, and put in the reps to get better.

- Reliable communication. You manage your time well and keep us looped in without needing constant check ins.

- A working setup. Your own PC, a decent pair of headphones, and a stable internet connection.

 

Prior marketing experience is a plus but not required. We care more about how you think, what you've made, and how quickly you can learn. Show us your scrappiest projects, even side ones.

 

 

COMPENSATION AND LOGISTICS

 

- $400 USD per month

- Full time, 40 hours per week

- Fully remote

- Based in the Philippines

title: AI Content Creator
description:
We're building an AI powered Fanvue content brand and need a creative partner to help bring it to life. You'll be making AI generated images and videos, experimenting with different content styles, and figuring out what resonates with an audience. This is a hands on role where you'll have real input into the direction we take.



What you'll be doing



Creating AI generated images using NanoBanana and similar tools. Producing and editing short form video content to make it polished and ready to post. Experimenting with different visual styles, themes, and content formats. Helping identify what type of content performs best and leaning into it. Maintaining a consistent look and feel across everything we put out. Communicating regularly on progress, ideas, and results.



What we're looking for



Experience using NanoBanana for AI image generation. Solid video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or whatever you're comfortable with). Someone who genuinely enjoys working with AI creative tools and keeps up with what's new. A good eye for what looks right and what doesn't. Self motivated and able to manage your own time without constant check ins. Clear communicator who's comfortable sharing ideas and feedback.



What we offer



$400/month starting pay. Fully remote with flexible hours. Training provided on our tools, workflow, and content strategy. A collaborative environment where your creative input actually matters.

title: Structured Data manager/operator
description:
We are a fast growing company and we are looking for a data entry engineer for our business. 

We are hiring a structured data operator.



This is NOT a writing job.

This is NOT a research/opinion job.



Your task is:

- collect exact data from official sources

- copy values exactly as shown

- attach correct source links

- follow strict rules



You will work inside our internal system (CDI).



IMPORTANT RULES:



- No guessing

- No interpretation

- No rewriting

- Only exact values from source

- If not clearly stated ? leave empty



Example:



GOOD:

Value: "The legal age for Internet or mobile gaming is 21."



BAD:

Value: 21

Value: legal (if not explicitly written)



You must be:

- very detail-oriented

- able to follow instructions exactly

- comfortable with repetitive tasks

- Might attach data sources you've found out. 

- Might use the VPN as our current target market is United States but we want to extend to other countries (Many operators, markets are allowed to access from the same locations). 

- You might able to work on the online casino, gambling data



You must NOT:

- invent data

- summarize sources

- use your own wording



We are building a structured data system, not content.



---



TEST TASK (required):



Before hiring, you must complete a short test.



You will be asked to:

- find 2–3 data points

- provide exact values

- provide source URLs

- provide source text



Only candidates who pass the test will be hired.



---



Work type:

- long-term

- repetitive data entry

- scalable workload



We will start small and expand quickly if quality is good.

title: AI UGC Video Editor
description:
AI UGC VIDEO EDITOR (FULL TIME, REMOTE)

 

We're hiring an AI UGC video editor to create short form content built to go viral on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. If you live and breathe short form video, study viral trends obsessively, and know how to use AI tools to produce content that actually performs, this role is for you.

 

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

 

You'll be the person we point at a brand or topic and trust to come back with content that performs. We're not looking for someone who needs heavy direction. We want someone with the taste, instincts, and execution skills to take an idea and turn it into a scroll stopping video.

 

You'll get to make content across multiple niches, including prediction markets, skin care, and AI dating, with room to expand into others over time. Each niche has its own audience, energy, and visual language, so versatility matters.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

- Edit short form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Generate AI UGC content (AI avatars, voiceovers, AI characters)

- Create AI generated images and visuals to support video content

- Stay on top of viral trends, audio, formats, and hooks

- Ship content quickly and iterate based on what's performing

- Test and develop new content angles across multiple niches

 

 

PLATFORMS YOU'LL CREATE FOR

 

- Instagram Reels

- TikTok

- YouTube Shorts

 

 

NICHES YOU'LL WORK IN

 

- Prediction markets

- Skin care

- AI dating

- Plus new niches as we expand

 

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

- Strong editing skills. You're fast, clean, and confident in CapCut, Premiere, or whatever your tool of choice is.

- Deep understanding of viral content. You can break down why a video popped off and replicate the patterns that made it work.

- Hands on experience with AI UGC tools. Things like HeyGen, Arcads, Captions, ElevenLabs, Runway, Midjourney, and similar.

- Taste. You know what feels native to each platform and what looks like AI slop. You care about the difference.

- Self direction. Point you at a niche, you come back with content. No hand holding required.

- A working setup. Your own PC capable of running editing software smoothly, a decent pair of headphones, and a stable internet connection.

title: Outbound Engagement Specialist
description:
Jumper Media is a social media marketing agency that helps brands grow through strategic social media engagement and authentic community building.



We are looking for a detail-oriented Outbound Engagement Specialist who understands that social media growth comes from real conversations and meaningful interactions — not generic comments.



Your role will be to represent our clients inside their Instagram communities by engaging with the right audiences and contributing to relevant conversations.



This is not a typical VA role. We are looking for someone who:

• Communicates naturally online

• Can adapt tone depending on audience and brand voice

• Understands online communities and social media culture

• Takes initiative to identify new engagement opportunities

• If you enjoy writing thoughtful comments and observing how people interact on social media, this role may be a great fit.



Role Details

Position: Outbound Engagement Specialist / Community Manager

Clients: 5–7 accounts

Work Type: Remote, Part-Time

Schedule: 7:00 PM – 12:00 AM

Compensation: $3/hour



What You'll Be Doing

In this role, you will help grow client Instagram accounts through strategic outbound engagement and community interaction.



You will:

• Write thoughtful comments on posts within the client’s target audience

• Like posts strategically to increase brand visibility

• Complete a minimum of 25 meaningful comments and 25 likes per client per day

• Engage with posts from potential customers, creators, and industry accounts

• Identify accounts that match the client’s target audience and engage naturally with their content

• Adjust tone depending on the brand voice, niche, and context

• Observe which comments spark responses or conversations

• Suggest new communities, hashtags, or engagement opportunities that may help grow the account

• This role requires someone who can think beyond simple tasks and contribute to genuine community engagement.



What We're Looking For

• At least 2 years of experience in community management, social media management, or a similar role

• Strong written English and ability to write natural, thoughtful comments

• Good understanding of Instagram culture and different audience types

• Ability to identify relevant accounts and engage appropriately

• Comfortable adjusting tone depending on context and brand voice

• Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT for ideation and workflow support

• Strong time management and ability to manage multiple client accounts during a shift

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work consistently during scheduled hours



Technical Requirements

• Reliable laptop or desktop

• Stable internet connection

• Ability to use VPN if required





Does this role sound like a good fit? Submit your application by sending your CV to 
 with the subject "SMM Outbound Engagement Specialist".

title: Business Development Representative (BDR) | DISRUPTORS MEDIA  LLC
description:
About Disruptors Media



We are an AI-first marketing agency based in Utah, serving contractors, trades, medical, legal, and professional service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue. We operate as the fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, combining strategy, content, and AI systems that produce measurable outcomes.



Inbound is strong and growing. Now we are building out the outbound engine to match. This role owns that engine.



The Role



As our BDR, you generate new pipeline from scratch. You will research ideal-fit service businesses, run targeted outbound across LinkedIn,
, and phone, and build a network of referral partners (CPAs, attorneys, business consultants, and franchise operators) who can send deals our way.



This is a craft role. Volume matters, but so does the quality of every touch. If you can write outbound that sounds like a human wrote it, research an account before you reach out, and stay disciplined over weeks of follow-up, you will win here.



What You Will Own



- Build and maintain targeted prospect lists of service businesses matching our ICP using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, and similar tools.



- Run multi-channel outbound sequences across LinkedIn (messages, voice notes, connection requests), cold
, and cold calling.



- Research accounts before outreach: who runs the business, what they sell, what they have publicly shared about their goals or challenges.



- Book qualified discovery calls on founder and CSM calendars. Our target is quality over quantity; a booked call from the right account is worth more than five from the wrong ones.



- Develop a referral partner network: identify and open relationships with professionals who serve the same audience (CPAs, attorneys, consultants, industry associations, franchisors).



- Own your CRM hygiene in GoHighLevel: accurate notes, clear stages, and next actions on every opportunity.



- Test and iterate on outbound copy, subject lines, opening lines, and sequences. Share what works.



- Report weekly on activity, reply rate, booked call rate, show rate, and pipeline created.



What You Bring



Required



- Two or more years in an outbound sales role, ideally at an agency, SaaS company, or B2B services firm.

- A track record of booking qualified meetings from cold outbound, not just inbound follow-up.

- Strong copywriting instincts. You can write a cold
 that does not sound like a cold
.

- Comfort on the phone. Cold calling is part of this role and we want someone who does not flinch.

- Excellent research skills and the patience to personalize at scale.

- Strong CRM discipline and the ability to self-manage a pipeline over long sales cycles.

- Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time overlap preferred).



Nice to Have



- Experience with Apollo, Clay, Smartlead, Instantly, LinkedHelper, or Sales Navigator.

- Experience selling into service businesses (contractors, trades, medical, legal, home services).

-  Experience building referral or partnership networks.

- Fluency with AI tools for research, data enrichment, and outbound personalization (Claude, ChatGPT, Clay AI, etc.).

- Light familiarity with marketing concepts: paid ads, SEO, content, lead gen, AI automation.



Compensation and Perks



- Competitive base salary with uncapped commission tied to booked calls, sourced revenue, and partnership deals.

- Clear promotion path into Account Executive, Partnerships Lead, or Sales Manager for strong performers.

- Remote-first role with flexible structure inside a US Mountain Time working window.

- Paid access to the sales, research, and AI stack we use internally (Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, Claude, etc.).

- Direct collaboration with founders on strategy, targeting, and positioning. Your input will shape the playbook.



How to Apply

Send the following to our hiring inbox: 

-  Your resume or LinkedIn profile.

-  A sample cold outreach sequence (three messages) you would send to a commercial roofing company owner to book a discovery call with us. Pretend you have already done account research.



-  A short Loom (under three minutes) walking us through your outbound process: how you build lists, how you personalize, how you follow up.



-  Your expected base salary and commission structure.

-  Applications without the outreach sample and Loom will not be reviewed.

-  We move quickly on hires. Top candidates will hear back within a week. If outbound is your craft and you want to build  pipeline inside a fast-growing AI-first agency, apply today.

title: Static Ad Creator – Meta Ads (DTC / Direct Response)
description:
We run performance-driven DTC brands and we're looking for a Static Ad Creator who lives and breathes direct response.

This is not a design job. Nobody here cares how pretty your portfolio looks. We care about one thing: do your ads make people stop, click, and buy? If the answer is yes — and you can prove it — keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing

You will receive angles, hooks, and references. Your job is to turn them into static ads that convert. You will produce multiple variations per concept, adapt creatives across Feed, Stories, and Reels, and iterate fast based on feedback and data. Speed and output quality both matter here.



Who This Is For

You have real experience creating ads for eCommerce or DTC brands — not mockups, not spec work, actual ads that ran and were tested. You understand why some ads convert and others don't. You can take direction, execute without hand-holding, and you know what CTR and CPA mean without having to Google them.



AI Is Not Optional

We use AI across the entire creative workflow — GPT for hooks and copy, Nano Banana and Higgsfield for image generation, and whatever else helps us move faster and test more. If you're not already using AI tools daily to produce creatives, this role is not for you.



How You Get Paid

Project-based, not a fixed salary.

Base rate: $15 per concept (3 creatives)

+$10 bonus if the ad hits KPI within 7 days

+$50 bonus when it reaches $2,500 in spend



Our best creators consistently earn more in bonuses than base pay. Top performers get more work and higher rates. Hours are flexible with long-term potential for the right person.



How to Apply

Start your message with the word PERFORMANCE — if it's missing, we won't read it.

Then include:

What ads you've created and where they ran

Which brands you've worked with

Why you think your ads perform well

Which AI tools you use regularly

No real examples means no reply.

title: Senior Unity Developer / Mobile Games (2D)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Senior Unity Developer for a Mobile Game Studio building casual board, word, and free-to-play simulated casino games. In this role, you will design, build, optimize, and maintain high-quality mobile game features across live titles and new prototypes.



You will work closely with product, design, art, and backend teams to deliver polished gameplay experiences, improve performance, support LiveOps initiatives, and help shape the technical direction of our Unity projects.



Key Responsibilities

* Unity Development: Build, maintain, and optimize mobile game features using Unity and C#.

* Gameplay Implementation: Develop core gameplay systems, UI flows, animations, rewards, progression, and game economy-related features.

* LiveOps Support: Implement in-app events, limited-time offers, content updates, and other LiveOps features for existing titles.

* Performance Optimization: Profile and improve game performance, memory usage, load times, and stability across iOS and Android devices.

* Architecture & Code Quality: Write clean, scalable, maintainable code and contribute to technical architecture decisions.

* SDK & Services Integration: Integrate and maintain analytics, ads, attribution, payments, social, and other third-party SDKs.

* Bug Fixing & Maintenance: Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve gameplay, UI, platform, and production issues.

* Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, artists, QA, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality features on schedule.

* Prototyping: Rapidly prototype new game ideas, features, mechanics, and UI/UX improvements.

* Technical Leadership: Mentor other developers, participate in code reviews, and help improve development processes.



Qualifications

* Professional Unity development experience, ideally in mobile games.

* Strong proficiency in C# and Unity development best practices.

* Experience building and shipping games for iOS and Android.

* Solid understanding of mobile performance optimization, memory management, and debugging.

* Experience implementing game UI, animations, rewards systems, progression systems, and player-facing features.

* Familiarity with free-to-play mobile game mechanics, LiveOps, monetization, and analytics-driven development.

* Experience integrating third-party SDKs such as analytics, ads, payments, attribution, or crash reporting tools.

* Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams including product, design, art, QA, and backend engineering.

* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

* Passion for gaming and a strong intuition for creating fun, polished player experiences.

title: SEO Virtual Assistant — Part-Time Ongoing (Champion Gym)
description:
Champion Gym is a martial arts, fitness, and leadership facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta, Canada. We have a complete SEO strategy and content system already built. We need a reliable part-time SEO VA to execute the ongoing content publishing and monitoring work each month.



This is NOT a strategy role. The strategy is fully documented. We need someone who follows clear instructions, implements content accurately in WordPress, monitors Google Search Console, and reports monthly.



We work with an AI content system that produces all strategy, keyword targeting, page briefs, and article drafts. Your job is implementation and monitoring — not strategy or content creation.



MONTHLY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Content Publishing (8–10 hrs/month)

- Upload 2 blog articles per month using provided drafts — format headings, add internal links, set SEO fields in RankMath

- Build 2–4 new landing pages per month from provided content briefs

- Ensure all published pages have correct title tags, meta descriptions, and focus keywords



Search Console Monitoring (2–3 hrs/month)

- Export monthly Search Results report from Google Search Console

- Identify pages gaining or losing impressions and clicks vs prior month

- Submit simple monthly report using our provided template



Basic Technical Checks (1–2 hrs/month)

- Check Coverage report for indexing errors

- Confirm newly published pages are indexed within 2 weeks

- Request indexing for new pages via URL inspection tool



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

- Complete content briefs and article drafts — no writing required

- Page template and monthly reporting template

- WordPress editor access and Google Search Console access

- Clear written instructions for every task

- 24-hour response time



REQUIRED SKILLS:

- Minimum 1 year SEO VA or WordPress content management experience

- Proficient with RankMath or Yoast SEO

- Can build WordPress pages from a written brief

- Has used Google Search Console — understands impressions, clicks, average position

- Detail-oriented and reliable — follows instructions precisely

- Fluent written English



TO APPLY — please include ALL of the following:

1. Describe your Google Search Console experience — what reports do you check and what do you look for?

2. Describe a time you uploaded or formatted a blog post in WordPress — what SEO settings did you configure?

3. Links to 1–2 websites you have done SEO work on

4. Your available hours per week and preferred schedule

5. Your hourly rate



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short paid test task before a final decision is made.

title: B2B Sales Caller — NZ Fintech (Cold Calling Accountants) — Paid Trial Month
description:
ABOUT US



We're Frontier Fintech, a New Zealand-based company. Our product Zipy (zipy.store) generates complete professional websites for small service businesses in 90 seconds using AI. The business owner just types their details, and Zipy builds them a website with a Google Map, contact form, services section, and hero image. They pay $19 USD/month to keep it.



We're hiring a full-time B2B Sales Caller to help us partner with New Zealand accountants. Each accountant who joins our affiliate program earns 32% recurring commission for every small business client they refer to Zipy. Your job is to call NZ accountants and convince them to join the program.



IMPORTANT: HONEST READ ON THIS ROLE



This is a paid trial month. After 30 days we'll evaluate results together. If you've delivered against the targets we agree on in week one (call volume, conversation quality, partners signed up), we extend you to a long-term role with a base salary increase and performance bonus structure on top. If results aren't there, the trial ends and we part ways respectfully.



We're being upfront about this because we don't want to waste your time or ours. We're a small startup and we can only afford this hire if it produces measurable results. If you're not comfortable with a one-month trial structure, this role isn't right for you.



For the right person who delivers, this is a long-term position. We'd love to keep someone for years.



SALARY AND HOURS



$1,000 USD/month (paid weekly via OnlineJobs EasyPay / Payoneer — $250 USD every Friday).



Hours: 8am to 4pm Manila time (PHT), Monday to Friday. This gives afternoon overlap with New Zealand business hours.



100% remote, work from home.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 50-80 outbound calls per day to a pre-loaded list of 1,800+ verified NZ accounting firms (we provide the list)

- Follow a proven script we provide and refine with you in week one

- Pitch the Zipy affiliate program: 32% recurring commission for accountants who refer their clients

- Send follow-up
s (templates provided) to interested accountants

- Update a shared spreadsheet daily with call status, outcomes, and notes

- Report weekly on calls made, conversations had, and partners signed up

- Daily standup with the founder (15 minutes) on Slack or



You're NOT closing the sale of Zipy itself. You're recruiting accountants to become affiliate partners. The accountant then refers their own clients. This is a much easier cold call than direct sales because you're offering them recurring income, not asking them to buy something.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (TRIAL MONTH TARGETS)



We'll agree on exact numbers in your first week, but expect targets in this range:



Week 1:
dials. Learn the script. 5-10 real conversations with accountants.

Week 2:
dials. 15-25 conversations. 1-2 partner signups.

Week 3:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 3-5 partner signups (cumulative 5-7).

Week 4:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 4-8 partner signups (cumulative 10-15 by end of month).



If by end of month you've signed up 8+ partners and demonstrated consistent call effort, the role becomes long-term with a base salary increase and partner-signup commission on top.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Strong spoken English. Clear, professional, neutral accent. NZ accountants are professional people and the call needs to sound credible.

- 1+ years of B2B cold calling experience (any industry — real estate, SaaS, insurance, finance, agency)

- Comfortable making 50+ calls per day. This is a high-volume role. You need stamina.

- Reliable internet and a quiet home work environment

- Available to start within 2 weeks of being hired



Preferred but not required:

- Experience with affiliate programs, partner channels, or referral marketing

- Familiarity with Google Sheets or similar

- Experience working with Western clients (US, UK, AU, NZ)



You don't need:

- Technical or website-building knowledge (we provide a 90-second walkthrough video)

- Sales certifications or formal training

- Industry experience in fintech or accounting



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- 1,800+ verified NZ accountant contacts with names, firms, and phone numbers

- Proven call script (we'll refine it with you in week one)

-
 templates for follow-ups

- Walkthrough video and partner landing page

- VOIP phone service or call platform (we cover this cost)

- Daily 15-minute standup with the founder for support

- Honest weekly feedback so you always know where you stand



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message including:



1. Brief intro (3-4 sentences about you and your B2B calling experience)



2. A 60-second voice recording of yourself reading this paragraph aloud:



"Hi, I'm calling from Zipy in Auckland. We help accountants like you add a recurring revenue stream by referring small business clients to our AI website builder. Your clients get a professional website built in 90 seconds, and you earn 32% recurring commission for every month they stay subscribed. I'd love to send you a quick walkthrough video and our partner page so you can see how it works. Would that be okay?"



Record on your phone and upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, or send the audio file directly. This is the most important part of the application — we hire on voice quality and clarity. Don't skip it.



3. Tell us about your most successful B2B cold-calling result. Specific numbers if possible (calls made, conversations had, conversions achieved).



4. Confirm you understand and accept the one-month paid trial structure described above.



5. Confirm you can work 8am-4pm PHT, Monday to Friday, starting within 2 weeks.



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT



We'll review applications within 48 hours of receiving them. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a 15-minute Zoom interview. We aim to make a hiring decision within one week of the application deadline.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Lloyd Brown

Co-Founder, Frontier Fintech

title: Tech VA
description:
We are a fast-growing med spa patient acquisition agency based in the US, and we are looking for a sharp, technically savvy VA to join our team part-time with real potential to grow into a full-time role as we scale.



This is not your average VA role. We need someone who genuinely loves figuring things out, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can jump between platforms and tasks without missing a beat. If you get excited when you encounter a new piece of software and your first instinct is to figure it out rather than ask for help, this role is for you.





What You Will Be Doing



Your primary responsibility will be building out client backends. This includes setting up GoHighLevel (GHL) sub-accounts, configuring HotProspector dialing accounts, and handling calendar integrations across multiple clients. Each client has a different setup, different software, and a different way of doing things, so no two days will look the same.

Beyond that, you will own the technical side of our operations. If something breaks, if a new integration needs to be built, or if a workflow needs to be fixed, that lands on your plate. You will be our go-to person for anything tech-related until we build out a more structured team around you.

Core Responsibilities



-Build and configure GHL sub-accounts for new and existing clients

-Set up and manage HotProspector accounts

-Build, troubleshoot, and maintain calendar integrations across various platforms (Google Calendar, ClubReady, Jane, PatientNow, Square, and others)

-Book inbound leads directly into clinic scheduling software, ensuring accurate appointment entry across each client's specific booking system

-Build and manage automations and workflows using 
 and GHL's native automation tools

-Troubleshoot and maintain Google Sheets and light Google Apps Script when needed

-Handle any technical tasks that arise across the agency day to day



What We Need You to Know



GoHighLevel (GHL) – you must have hands-on experience building inside the platform, not just using it


 or similar automation tools (Zapier, n8n) – you need to understand how automations and multi-step workflows are built and how to troubleshoot them

title: Social Media Video Editor / Content Director — AI-Forward Dental Brand
description:
We're 5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions — a dental implant + sleep medicine practice in Downey, California. We're hiring a remote Social Media Video Editor / Content Director who knows AI tools and can think strategically — not just cut and assemble.



This is the opposite of "edit what we send you and take 3 days per video." We want a self-directing creator who can come up with ideas, find what's working in our niche, ship 5-10 short-form videos per week, and use every AI tool in their toolbelt to do it faster than the next editor.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

- Edit short-form vertical (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) for both 5D Smiles (dental implants) and WakeWell Sleep (oral-appliance therapy)

- Come up with the video IDEAS — not just edit what's sent

- Build hook strategies that work for our niche (dental + sleep)

- Use AI for ideation, scripting, captions, b-roll, voice cloning — whatever saves time

- Ship 5-10 finished videos per week, every week

- Track performance and iterate based on what hits



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- A real portfolio (we want to see your best work — link it in your application)

- Proof you've grown an audience yourself OR an account you've run (exact follower count + starting count)

- Daily AI use — Claude Code, ChatGPT, Runway, Pika, Sora, ElevenLabs, Submagic, Opus Clip, Descript

- Speed — we want to know your hours-per-60-second-video, exact

- Hook craft — the first 3 seconds determine if a video lives or dies, and you need to know why

- (Bonus) Graphics design ability — Photoshop, Canva, Figma — for thumbnails + tiles

- (Bonus) Account directorship — can you plan a whole month of content for one brand?



WHAT YOU'LL GET:

- Competitive pay weekly via EasyPay (range based on portfolio + speed + AI fluency, discussed once we see your work)

- Direct mentorship on the AI-creator stack — we use these tools every day at the practice

- Long-term role — we're building a content team, not hiring a one-off freelancer

- Real growth path: editor ? senior editor ? content director (manage other editors)

- Work with a CEO (Dr. Henry Qiu) who is genuinely AI-forward and ships fast — no committee, no slow approvals



HOW TO APPLY:

Apply at 



Our application is short. The most important questions:

- Drop a link to your best work

- Pitch us 5 video ideas if we gave you 30 days running our channels

- Tap any standout signals (own audience 10k+, viral hit 100k+, 50+ videos shipped, healthcare niche)



Plan ~10-15 minutes for the full apply flow. Strong candidates get a reply within 48hr.



— Dr. Henry Qiu, Founder

5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions, Downey CA

title: Google Ads Specialist (Lead Generation, Data-Driven)
description:
Job Description

We are a Dutch marketing agency focused on helping local businesses generate more leads. Our clients care about real results such as quote requests, showroom visits and contact inquiries.



We are looking for a Google Ads specialist who is highly data-driven and focused on performance.



Your role is to manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns with a strong focus on lead generation. You will improve cost per lead, increase the number of leads and scale campaigns that perform well.



You work based on data. You analyze campaigns, run experiments and continuously optimize. When you see opportunities, you act on them. If campaigns perform well, you proactively suggest increasing budgets.



You will work with Dutch campaigns. Our team will support you with translations and ad copy, but you are responsible for testing what works.



You also think beyond campaigns. If you see issues or opportunities in landing pages or tracking, you flag them and help improve results.



Key responsibilities

Managing and optimizing Google Ads campaigns

Improving cost per lead and increasing conversions

Scaling campaigns that perform well

Running tests and analyzing performance data

Working with GA4, Google Tag Manager and conversion tracking

Identifying opportunities and proactively improving results



Requirements

At least 2 years of experience with Google Ads

Experience with lead generation campaigns, not only e-commerce

Strong analytical skills and experience with data-driven optimization

Experience with GA4, Google Ads and Google Tag Manager

Understanding of conversion tracking and the value of conversions

Experience with Looker Studio is a plus

Proactive mindset and ability to work independently

Attention to detail and strong ownership

title: Remote Sales and Booking Coordinator
description:
REMOTE SALES & BOOKING COORDINATOR

Prime Shine Detailing — Canada (fully remote, night shift)

Commission-based | Night shift (9pm–1am PHT) | Work from home | Part-time



?????????????????????????????



ABOUT THE ROLE



Prime Shine is a fast-growing mobile auto detailing company based in Ontario, Canada. We run paid ads that generate consistent inbound leads every day — your job is to call those leads quickly, qualify them, and book them into our schedule. No cold calling. Every person you call has already shown interest in our service. You are not starting from zero — we have a live ads campaign generating inbound leads daily.



?????????????????????????????



HOURS



This is a night shift role. Hours are 9:00am–1:00pm Eastern Time (Canada), which is 9:00pm–1:00am Philippine Time. Please only apply if you are comfortable with and available for these hours consistently. Hours may grow as the business expands.



?????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Call inbound leads as quickly as possible after they submit a form — speed is the most important part of this role

- Follow a proven call script to qualify leads and book them into our calendar

- Prioritize booking jobs geographically — we cluster appointments by area to keep our techs efficient, so you'll always try to book nearby jobs back-to-back

- Update and manage leads inside our CRM (GoHighLevel — full training provided)

- Send follow-up texts to leads who don't answer and attempt callbacks

- Handle any overnight or missed leads first thing at the start of each shift

- Flag anything outside your script — pricing exceptions, complaints, or unusual requests — to the owner immediately

- Book jobs as far out as needed — we do not cap the calendar, so if the next available slot is a month away, book it



?????????????????????????????



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Excellent spoken and written English — confident, warm, and natural on the phone

- Reliable and punctual — leads go cold within the hour, showing up on time matters

- Organized — you'll manage multiple leads at different stages simultaneously

- Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Previous sales, appointment setting, or customer service experience is a strong asset

- Stable internet connection and a quiet environment for calls



?????????????????????????????



COMPENSATION



- 20% of job value per booked job (up to $3,000 CAD/month earned)

- $10 CAD flat per booked job above the $3,000 CAD/month threshold

- Average job value: $200–$250 CAD

- Estimated closes: 2–4 jobs per day

- Payment: bi-weekly via Wise



At 3 closes per day across 20 working days, you'd generate roughly $12,000 CAD in bookings and earn approximately $2,400 CAD (~90,000 PHP) that month. Strong performance will push you into the $10 flat rate per close — we'll explain exactly how that threshold works before you start so there are no surprises.



We will be transparent about lead volume before you start.



?????????????????????????????



TO APPLY



Send a short written introduction (5–8 sentences) — who you are, your experience with phone or sales work, and why you're a good fit. Then answer this question in writing:



"A lead submits a form at 11pm your time and doesn't answer when you call. What do you do?

title: AI-Style Video Editor (IG/TikTok)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled, self-motivated AI video editor with a proven track record of growing and managing social media accounts at scale. This is not an entry-level position. You will be responsible for producing a high volume of polished, platform-optimized content every single day using the latest AI video tools — and you need to already know how to use them. If you are still learning the tools, this role is not for you.



What You'll Be Doing:

You will create and deliver 8 videos per day, 6 days per week, formatted and optimized for TikTok and Instagram. Each video must be platform-native — built for how real audiences watch, scroll, and engage — not repurposed content. You will work with a suite of cutting-edge AI tools including Veo 3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higfields, Nano, and Banana Pro, as well as any other AI video generation and editing platforms relevant to the project. You will be expected to stay current with new tools and features as they emerge, incorporate them into your workflow without hand-holding, and consistently push the quality and creativity of the output.



Who We're Looking For:

You have at minimum 6 months of hands-on experience editing and producing AI-generated video content — not just social media content generally, but specifically AI-style video using the tools listed above or their direct equivalents. More importantly, you have results. You have managed or contributed to accounts with hundreds of thousands of followers, or ideally one or more accounts at the 1 million+ follower mark. You know what performs on TikTok and Instagram, you understand algorithmic behavior, and you have the portfolio to prove it.

You are organized, fast, and reliable. Eight videos a day, six days a week is not a stretch goal — it is the baseline. You take feedback well, hit deadlines without reminders, and treat every piece of content as something worth doing right, even on a tight schedule.



Requirements:

Minimum 6 months of direct experience with AI video editing and generation tools

Demonstrated experience managing or producing content for accounts with 100,000+ followers (1M+ strongly preferred)

Full-time availability to produce and deliver 8 videos/day across a 6-day work week for TikTok and Instagram

Proficiency with Veo 3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higfields, Nano, and Banana Pro

Strong eye for platform-native design, pacing, and trends

Ability to work independently with minimal direction



How to Apply:

Submit your application with the following:



Links to accounts you have managed or produced content for — please include current follower count and your specific role/contribution:

Video samples showcasing your AI editing work across TikTok and/or Instagram

A brief note on which AI tools you use most and why



Applications without account examples will not be considered. We want to see real results on real accounts.

title: Basketball Video Analyst I — Stat Tracking (Paid Trial)
description:
(READ TO THE END — APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS ARE AT THE BOTTOM. APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT FOLLOW THEM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.)



I need a careful, focused person to watch basketball game footage and record what happens on the court — accurately, in a fixed format, on a deadline. This can grow into a substantial ongoing role for the right person — up to 30-40 hours per week. I am building a team of 10-15 analysts.



THE WORK

- I send you a YouTube link of a basketball game (NBA, college, or international).

- You watch the video at 2x speed.

- You record points scored, by player, for both teams, in a Google Sheet I provide.

- You return the completed sheet within 2-6 hours of receiving the link.



WHY THIS IS NOT TYPICAL DATA ENTRY

Basketball moves fast. Players are in motion. Jersey numbers are the only reliable way to identify who scored. If you guess, the data is useless to me. The job is to watch carefully and record exactly what happened — not to summarize, not to interpret, not to fill in gaps with assumptions. If you miss a play, rewind. If you can't tell who scored, mark it unknown. Honest reporting is more important than a clean-looking sheet.



PAY

- Trial task: flat $2.50 USD, paid via your preferred method (PayPal / GCash / Wise) within 48 hours of submission, regardless of whether I hire you for ongoing work. Trial is the first half of one game — about 25 minutes of video. With 2x playback and rewinds, expect roughly 15-20 minutes of your time.

- Ongoing rate after a successful trial: $4/hour, paid hourly. The trial fee is a flat completion payment for a screening task, separate from the ongoing rate — don't extrapolate one from the other. Ongoing work expects you to move efficiently once you're familiar with the format.

- Workload scales with your availability — anywhere from 5 hours/week up to 30-40 hours/week if you can sustain quality output and we have games to track.



WHAT I AM SCREENING FOR

- Attention to detail under boredom

- Following written instructions exactly

- Honest reporting (saying "I'm not sure" when the footage is unclear)

- Returning work on time



YOU ARE NOT A FIT IF

- You have not watched a basketball game in the last year

- You plan to multitask while doing this work



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED — applications missing any of these will not be reviewed)

1. Begin your reply with the word REBOUND as the first word of your message. This is how I confirm you read the post.

2. Briefly describe one piece of detail-heavy work you've done where accuracy mattered more than speed (data entry, transcription, sports stats, audits — anything qualifies). One paragraph.

3. On a scale of 1-10, how familiar are you with basketball? It's fine to say 1. I would rather have a careful 4 than a confident 8.

4. Tell me your internet speed in Mbps (check at 
) and whether your connection drops during YouTube playback.

5. State your time zone and tell me how many hours per week you would realistically be available for this work.

6. Confirm you can return a 30-minute trial task within 24 hours of receiving it.

7. Confirm one currency you'd like to be paid in: PayPal USD / GCash PHP / Wise USD. Currency only — no account info.



Do not include WhatsApp,
, or any external contact info in your reply. Apply through OnlineJobs.ph only. Replies with external links will be ignored.

The Sales and Communications Administrator is a central coordination role responsible for managing client communications, shared inboxes, sales support workflows, and logistics tracking activities. The role acts as the primary administrative and communication hub between clients, couriers, sales staff, warehouse teams, and project stakeholders.



This position ensures timely responses to enquiries, accurate tracking and reporting, structured job and quotation administration, and proactive follow-up on orders and deliveries. The role combines operational logistics support with structured sales and project administration in a fast-paced, detail-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities



Manage shared inboxes and ensure timely responses (within 1 working hour)

Acknowledge enquiries, delegate tasks, and follow up where required

Maintain job references, folders, and standard
 templates

Register new job briefs and issue job reference numbers

Support quotation tracking, follow-ups, and job confirmations

Maintain WIP and quotation registers

Cross-check purchase orders against quotations

Track domestic and international shipments

Provide clients with delivery updates and ETAs

Escalate delays or high-risk consignments

Request and manage Proof of Delivery (POD)

Communicate with couriers to chase, redirect, or confirm deliveries

Contact clients to resolve delivery or tracking issues

Assist with project setup, document management, and Teams channels

Coordinate with warehouse teams on inbound and outbound goods

Close completed or cancelled jobs accurately

Maintain shared folders and job documentation

Upload receiving photos to Teams and job folders

Support ad-hoc admin tasks and process improvements



Qualifications



Strong written and verbal communication

Excellent organization and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

Confidence dealing with clients, couriers, and internal teams

Proficiency in Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive/SharePoint)

Understanding of logistics and shipment tracking (preferred)



What We Offer



Hybrid in Cebu (twice a month)/ Work-from-home flexibility | Full-time

title: Systems & Microsoft 365 Engineer (Intune/MDM, SharePoint, Security)
description:

/collaboration security policies (as applicable)

Required experience / skills

Strong experience in Microsoft 365 administration in business environments

Deep hands-on expertise with Intune (MDM/MAM) and endpoint policy management

Strong SharePoint Online administration skills (permissions, governance, structure)

Certifications (MS-102, MD-102, SC-300, SC-400)

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant
description:
E-commerce Virtual Assistant (Etsy, Shopify, Amazon) – Faith-Based Brand for Moms | Part-Time ? Full-Time



**Company:** GloFusion Creations LLC

**Industry:** Faith-Based Apparel & Gifts for Christian Moms

**Location:** Remote

**Position Type:** Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time Opportunity



About Us



GloFusion Creations is a growing Christian lifestyle brand focused on uplifting, faith-filled products for moms. We sell across Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon, and we’re building a scalable brand that combines creativity, systems, and purpose.



We are looking for a **detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant** who can help manage and grow our stores while maintaining a high standard of quality and consistency.



Your Role

You will be responsible for **day-to-day store operations, listing optimization, and backend management** across our platforms.



This is not just a task-based role — we are looking for someone who can **think, improve systems, and grow with the business.**



Responsibilities



**Store Management**

* Manage Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon listings

* Upload and optimize new products (titles, descriptions, tags, images)

* Ensure all listings follow SEO best practices

* Maintain consistency across all platforms



Product Listings & SEO

* Use provided templates to create high-converting listings

* Conduct keyword research (Etsy + Amazon)

* Update underperforming listings



Order & Customer Support

* Monitor orders and ensure smooth fulfillment (Printify)

* Respond to customer messages in a professional, warm tone

* Handle basic customer issues (tracking, delays, etc.)



Design & Content Support

* Use Canva to create simple mockups, size charts, and info cards

* Upload and organize product images

* Assist with Pinterest or basic social media posting (optional bonus)



Operations & Organization

* Keep spreadsheets updated (product tracking, uploads, performance)

* Help maintain organized workflows

* Suggest improvements to systems and processes



Requirements



Experience

* Proven experience with Etsy (REQUIRED)

* Shopify and/or Amazon experience (HIGHLY preferred)

* Familiarity with Printify or Print-on-Demand



Skills

* Strong understanding of SEO for product listings

* Excellent written English (clear, professional communication)

* High attention to detail (VERY important)

* Organized and able to follow systems



Tools (Preferred but not required)

* Canva

* ChatGPT or AI tools

* Google Sheets / Excel



 Ideal Candidate

* Proactive (doesn’t wait to be told everything)

* Reliable and consistent

* Has a growth mindset

* Can follow instructions but also improve systems

* Comfortable working with a faith-based brand



Compensation

* Starting: $4/hour (based on experience)

* Performance-based increases

* Opportunity to move into a full-time role



Growth Opportunity

This role can grow into a **Store Manager position** where you help oversee operations, manage systems, and scale the business.



How to Apply

To apply, include the following:

1. Your experience with Etsy, Shopify, or Amazon

2. Examples of listings you have created or managed

3. What SEO strategies you use for product listings

4. Your favorite productivity tool and why

5. Include the word **“GLOW”** in your application so we know you read everything



Important



We are looking for someone long-term. If you are only looking for short-term work, this may not be a good fit.



We’re excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and be part of building something meaningful.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Customer Service Representative (CSR)

As a CSR for Plumbing, Cooling, and Electrical Nerds, you are the first point of contact for customers in need. Your goal is to provide a 5-star "Nerd" experience by listening to customer concerns, diagnosing their needs over the phone, and booking appointments with speed and empathy.



Daily Expectations:



- Handle inbound calls from customers regarding plumbing, cooling, and electrical issues.

- Book appointments directly into ServiceTitan following company protocols.

- Maintain a high "Booking Rate" by overcoming customer objections.

- Provide clear information regarding service fees and technician arrival windows.

- Ensure every customer feels heard and valued from the first "hello."



Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have ServiceTitan experience.

- Previous experience in a CSR role, specifically within the home service industry.

- Superior English verbal skills with a friendly, professional tone.

- Ability to multitask: typing notes into the CRM while speaking with the customer.

- A "problem-solver" mindset—you don't just take calls; you provide solutions.

title: Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a skilled video editor to own the post-production workflow for both long-form and short-form content. Someone who brings technical precision and aesthetic sensibility to content about healing, consciousness, and medicine.



This is a remote, part-time role with consistent weekly work. Volume increases as the channel grows.



WHAT YOU'LL EDIT



- YouTube long-form (10-20 min talking-head + B-roll): color grade, audio cleanup, typography/titles, subtitles, pacing

- Instagram Reels + TikTok (30-90 sec): masking, motion typography, text overlays, B-roll integration, hook-optimized cuts

- YouTube Shorts: vertical reformats from long-form, punchy cuts, subtitle styling



MUST-HAVE SKILLS



- Advanced masking — background replacement, subject isolation, motion tracking

- Typography + kinetic text — on-brand title cards, pull quotes, lower thirds

- Subtitle/caption generation and styling (burned-in, not just SRT)

- Color correction and grading — fixing mixed lighting, skin tone accuracy, cinematic look

- Audio cleanup — noise reduction, leveling, music ducking

- Brand consistency — maintaining the same look/feel across all platforms



Software: Proficiency in Filmora required (our primary editing tool). Familiarity with Riverside.fm strongly preferred — understanding how to work with multi-track Riverside exports is a big plus. Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve experience welcome.



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with wellness, health, or educational content

- Motion graphics (After Effects or Filmora effects)

- Familiarity with teleprompter-style talking-head footage

- Vertical-first content experience (Reels/TikTok)



THE AESTHETIC



Clean. Warm. Credible. Not flashy. Think: calm authority, subtle motion, typography that adds meaning rather than noise. References: Andrew Huberman Lab, Mark Hyman, Sam Harris. Healing content that looks like it was made with intention.

Inbound Reply Handling

- Respond quickly to inbound
s from AI-powered outreach

Pipeline & CRM Management

Qualifications

Summary:

- Cold calling: 2 years (Required)

Location: Remote



Job Type: Full-time

title: Land Entitlement Project Assistant
description:
About Us



We are a South Florida-based land entitlement firm specializing in platting, zoning coordination, and development approvals across Miami-Dade, Broward, and surrounding municipalities.



Our work requires precision, persistence, and strong coordination with local agencies. We are growing and looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help manage project tracking and ensure consistent follow-ups so nothing falls through the cracks.





Role Overview



This role is focused on tracking deadlines, managing follow-ups, and maintaining organization across multiple active projects.



You will act as a key support role to ensure all projects continue moving forward by proactively monitoring timelines and communicating with agencies.



This is not a passive admin role—we are looking for someone who is organized, proactive, and takes ownership of tasks.





Key Responsibilities



Project Tracking & Organization

* Maintain and update a Master Project Tracker (Excel or Google Sheets)

* Track multiple active projects (plats, waivers, LOAs, etc.)

* Monitor deadlines, submissions, and required follow-ups

* Ensure all project information is accurate and up to date



Follow-Ups & Communication

* Send professional follow-up
s to municipalities, agencies, and consultants

* Track all outgoing and incoming communications

* Schedule and track follow-up intervals (typically every 3–5 business days)

* Escalate delays, missing responses, or issues when needed



 & Administrative Support

* Monitor a shared inbox or assigned
 account

* Draft clear, professional
 responses

* Organize
 threads and maintain communication records

* Assist with scheduling and coordination when required



Reporting & Accountability

* Provide a weekly summary of:

    * Follow-ups sent

    * Responses received

    * Outstanding items

* Flag any risks, delays, or unclear responses promptly





Required Skills & Qualifications

* Strong written English (clear, professional communication)

* Extremely detail-oriented and organized

* Ability to manage multiple tasks and timelines simultaneously

* Experience with Excel or Google Sheets

* Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

* Ability to follow structured processes (SOPs)



Preferred (Not Required)

Work Schedule

Compensation

Growth Opportunity

This role has the potential to grow into a long-term position with increased responsibility, including deeper involvement in project coordination and client communication.

title: Affiliate Sales Rep (Remote – Warm Leads Provided)
description:
Job Description

Must have EXPERIENCE with Sales. 

We are looking for experienced, high-performance sales closers to join our remote call center team. This is not cold calling — you will be speaking with warm leads who have already shown interest in our products (abandoned checkouts, past customers, and subscribers).



This role is for someone who knows how to take control of a conversation, build trust quickly, handle objections, and confidently close. Your primary responsibility is simple: convert interest into sales. You will be expected to follow a proven script while also being able to adapt in real-time to each customer and drive the conversation toward a purchase.



You’ll also have the ability to send customers your personal affiliate link or discount code to complete purchases, giving you full control over your earning potential.



We sell high-demand wellness products with strong conversion rates, meaning the opportunity to earn is directly tied to your ability to close. If you’re competitive, money-driven, and know how to turn warm leads into revenue consistently, this is the role for you.



This is a performance-based opportunity with serious earning potential for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



Calling warm leads (no cold calling)

Following a simple, proven script

Handling basic objections and closing sales

Sending your affiliate link/discount code via text if needed

Upselling additional products when appropriate



Compensation Discussed during 1st interview (This is where it gets exciting)





Average Order Value: $56.12

Average Profit Per Order: ~$30



15% per sale

You earn about $8–$10 per sale



Realistic Earnings:



15 sales/day = $120–$150/day ? $840–$1,050/week

30 sales/day = $240–$300/day ? $1,680–$2,100/week



Top performers can scale beyond this.



We provide the leads. Your income depends on how well you close.



Why This Is Different



No cold calling

Warm, high-intent leads

Proven products that already convert

Simple system — just plug in and close

Unlimited earning potential



Requirements



Strong communication skills

Confident speaking on the phone

Ability to follow a script and adapt naturally

Reliable and consistent

Sales experience is a plus, but not required

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Online Market Strategist to join our team and drive marketing initiatives for our IT products. Discover effective marketing and promotional channels, including media platforms to be used to relay product messages to customers.

Investigate the performance of a company’s marketing campaigns and strategies through evaluating key performance metrics.

Create innovative marketing campaigns depending on robust data and present the recommendations to management.

Establish and maintain relationships with new and existing clients through networking and prospecting.

Create goals and objectives in order to approach customers through appropriate marketing channels.

Help in outbound and inbound marketing activities by displaying expertise in certain areas such as events planning, advertising, optimization and content development.





Qualifications:

Strong knowledge of digital marketing strategies, including SEO, SEM, PPC, and social media.

Experience with marketing automation tools and CRM software (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.).

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and drive data-based decisions.

Proficiency in design and content creation tools (Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, etc.) is a plus.

Preferred Skills:

Experience with B2B marketing and lead generation.

Familiarity with
 marketing platforms and campaign management.



HOW TO APPLY:

Send your CV to 
 with the following details:

- Onlinejobs Profile link:

title: Sales & Operations Coordinator| Cleaning Company|$6-8 USD per hr
description:
Job Title: Sales & Operations Coordinator

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time | Wednesday–Sunday | 40 hours/week



About Us:

We are  a fast-growing, family-run residential and commercial cleaning company based in Bellevue, Washington. We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, dependable service with a personal touch. As we continue to expand, we're looking for a highly organized and adaptable Sales & Operations Coordinator to help support our day-to-day operations and keep things running smoothly behind the scenes. We are a small team but a mighty team and love to have fun and celebrate our wins.



Position Overview:

You will work closely with our Operations Manager to ensure that schedules, systems, and communications are running efficiently. You’ll be the behind-the-scenes support that makes everything work - from rescheduling cleans and entering bookkeeping data to coordinating Google Business posts and managing internal team milestones.



This is a full-time, Wednesday - Sunday role. You’ll take the lead on operations support Saturday and Sundays, and assist the Operations Manager Wednesday through Friday. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, flexible in a fast-changing environment, and able to prioritize daily responsibilities with confidence and clarity.

Ideal Candidate:

Strong written and verbal communication skills



Extremely organized with excellent follow-through



Self-starter who can handle repetitive tasks and still keep an eye on the big picture



Flexible and able to shift gears quickly when priorities change



Comfortable with remote tools (Google Workspace, Slack, BookingKoala, GoHighLevel, etc.)



Compensation & Hours:



Full-time, 40 hours/week (Wednesday through Sunday)



Flexible working hours, though availability during core business hours (9am–5pm PST) is required



Competitive pay based on experience



Room for growth in operations and team leadership

Monthly profit-sharing bonuses after 3 months of full employment



Bonuses for closed sales (structure TBD based on candidate experience)

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) | DISRUPTORS MEDIA LLC
description:
About Disruptors Media



We are an AI-first marketing agency based in Utah, serving contractors, trades, medical, legal, and professional service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue. We operate as the fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, combining strategy, content, and AI systems that produce measurable outcomes.



Our founders show up on content every day. That content drives inbound interest, and inbound interest needs a human who can move fast, ask the right questions, and put the right people on calls. That human is you.



The Role



As our SDR, you are the first human touchpoint for inbound leads coming from content on Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, podcast appearances, referrals, and events. Your job is to qualify quickly, nurture with care, and book high-intent discovery calls for our founders and client success managers.



This is not a seat for someone who waits for a lead list to be handed over. You will build playbooks, own your pipeline, and improve the conversion of every message we send. If you love the craft of sales conversation, you will like what we have built.



What You Will Own



- Respond to inbound leads across DMs,
, website forms, and ad campaigns, typically within 15 minutes during business hours.



-  Qualify prospects against our ICP: service businesses doing $300K or more in revenue in contracting, trades, medical, legal, or professional services.



-  Book discovery calls on founder and CSM calendars with qualified, high-intent prospects.



-  Nurture warm leads that are not yet ready to buy with thoughtful, value-first follow-up over weeks and months.



-  Maintain a clean CRM in GoHighLevel, with accurate notes, stages, and next actions on every opportunity.



-  Run inbound follow-up sequences: call, text,
, LinkedIn voice note, whatever wins the response.



- Report weekly on speed-to-lead, qualification rate, booked call rate, show rate, and pipeline velocity.



-  Feed insights back to marketing: what content triggers calls, what objections keep coming up, what patterns we need to know.



What You Bring



Required



-  One or more years in an SDR, BDR, or inside sales role, ideally at an agency, SaaS company, or professional services firm.

-  A track record of hitting or beating booked-meeting quotas.

-  Phone presence that reads as confident, curious, and human, not scripted.

-  Excellent written communication. You can write a DM, a follow-up
, or a text that earns a reply.

-  Strong organizational skills and comfort living inside a CRM.

-  Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time overlap preferred).



Nice to Have

-  Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Close, or similar CRMs.

-  Familiarity with service business owners (contractors, trades, medical, legal).

-  Experience selling marketing, agency, or AI services.

-  Fluency with AI tools for research, note-taking, and message drafting (Claude, ChatGPT, Clay, Apollo, etc.).

-  Light familiarity with marketing concepts: paid ads, SEO, content, lead gen.



Compensation and Perks



-  Competitive base salary with uncapped commission tied to booked calls and closed revenue.

-  Clear promotion path into Account Executive or Client Success Manager for strong performers.

-  Remote-first role with flexible structure inside a US Mountain Time working window.

-  Paid access to sales tools, CRM, and AI software we use internally.

-  Direct mentorship from the founders. You will be in the room when strategy is built, not after.



How to Apply



-  Send the following to our hiring inbox:



-  Your resume or LinkedIn profile.



-  A short Loom (under three minutes) pretending you are following up with a contractor who filled out a form but did not answer your call. Show us how you handle it.



-  A brief note on your best sales month ever: what you sold, how much, and why it worked.



-  Your expected base salary and commission structure.



-  Applications without the Loom will not be reviewed.



We move quickly on hires. Top candidates will hear back within a week. If you love the front end of sales and want to build a career inside a fast-moving AI-first agency, apply today.

title: Shopify Website Builder Needed — Theme Rebuild + Long-Term Potential
description:
We're Viral Slice Co, and we need a skilled Shopify developer to port our existing live store to a new premium theme we've already purchased. The content, products, collections, and brand assets all stay the same — we just need everything rebuilt cleanly inside the new theme without losing functionality, SEO, or design polish.



This is a one-time project with a hard 1-week deadline. If you crush it, there's a strong chance of ongoing Shopify work down the road.



==========================================================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Migrate our existing Shopify store onto the new theme (we'll provide the theme file and admin access)

- Rebuild all key pages: home, collection pages, product pages, cart, checkout, about, contact, policies

- Reconfigure and reinstall all existing Shopify apps in the new theme

- Match (and where possible, improve) the current site's visual design — spacing, typography, brand consistency

- Customize Liquid templates where the theme's drag-and-drop falls short

- Preserve all SEO: URLs, meta titles/descriptions, alt text, 301 redirects where needed

- Test thoroughly across desktop and mobile before handoff

- Provide a brief Loom walkthrough of what was changed at the end



==========================================================



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS



- 2+ years of hands-on Shopify development — please share live store URLs you've built or migrated

- Strong Liquid skills — you can edit templates, sections, and snippets (not just theme editor work)

- Shopify apps experience — comfortable reinstalling, reconfiguring, and troubleshooting third-party apps

- SEO awareness — you understand how to preserve URLs, meta data, and avoid traffic loss during migrations

- Strong design eye — clean layouts, consistent spacing, attention to typography and brand details

- Reliable internet and full availability for the 7-day project window

- Strong written English for clear daily updates

- Available to start within 2-3 days of being hired



NICE-TO-HAVE



- Experience with Shopify 2.0 themes and JSON templates

- Basic understanding of Core Web Vitals / page speed optimization

- Familiarity with Klaviyo, 
, or other common Shopify apps



==========================================================



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, your application MUST include all of the following (applications missing any item will be ignored):



1. The word "PIXEL" at the very top of your message (this confirms you read the listing)

2. Links to 2-3 live Shopify stores you've built or migrated, with a one-line note on what you did for each

3. Your fixed-price quote to complete this project in 7 days

4. Your earliest available start date

5. A brief answer: "What's the trickiest part of a theme migration, and how do you handle it?"



Applications that paste a generic cover letter or skip these steps won't get a reply.



We move fast and pay fast. Looking forward to hearing from you.

description:

About the Role

This role is less about real estate experience and more about execution, structure, and problem-solving.

You will take high-level direction from leadership and turn it into clear, repeatable processes, ensuring our team follows through consistently without constant oversight.



If you thrive in environments where you’re given the outcome—but not the step-by-step instructions—this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

• Ensure tea
mbers follow established processes exactly

mbers (cold callers, lead managers, acquisitions) with operational issues

5. Problem Solving & Systems Management

• Identify problems proactively before they become bigger issues

• Figure things out independently (even with limited instruction)



What Success Looks Like

• Tasks fro
etings are executed quickly and accurately

• Tea
mbers follow processes without constant reminders from the owner

• KPIs are tracked, understood, and improved over time

• Operations run smoothly without bottlenecks or confusion



Who This Role Is Perfect For

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-focused

• Self-directed — you don’t wait to be told what to do next

mbers

Not Required (But a Plus)

Important Note

This is not a passive role.

mbers accountable to standards
