title: Social Media Content Machine (Research+Video editing)
description:
**Organic Content Iterator — AI Health & Wellness Brand**



We run a fast-scaling AI-powered social media brand in the health & wellness space, generating tens of millions of views per month across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube.



We need ONE person whose entire job is multiplying our viral outliers. You don't create content from scratch. You take what's already working and turn each winner into 3–5 split-test iterations.



This is a trial reels operator role. You live in the iteration loop.



---



**This role is NOT for you if:**

- You want to come up with concepts from scratch

- You only edit videos

- You only write scripts

- You need a brief to start working

- You don't understand why a video went viral



**This role IS for you if** you can look at a viral outlier, instantly see 5 ways to remix it, and ship those iterations yourself — script, edit, and all.



---



**What you own**



**1. Outlier scanning (daily)**

- Monitor our organic accounts across IG, TikTok, FB, YouTube

- Identify viral outliers the 
nt they break out

- Track which avatars (Helga, Marc, Sepp, Kiona, etc.) are hitting and on which platforms



**2. Iteration engine (your main job)**

- Take every viral outlier ? produce 3–5 split-test iterations

- Test new hooks, openings, angles, pacing, CTAs on the proven structure

- Each iteration is a clean trial reel — not a remix that dilutes the original

- Goal: turn 1 winner into 5 reels that all have a real shot at popping



**3. Scripting & psychology**

- Rewrite hooks and scripts for each iteration

- Understand WHY the original worked — the customer psychology behind the hook, the retention mechanic, the payoff

- Match each iteration to the avatar's voice and audience



**4. Editing**

- Edit videos yourself in CapCut / Premiere / similar

- Own pacing, structure, cuts, captions, retention curves

- Ship polished output without needing a separate editor



---



**Required**



- Deep understanding of viral short-form (IG Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

- Editing skills — CapCut, Premiere, or equivalent

- Hands-on with AI video tools: VEO, Sora, Kling, AI avatars, ElevenLabs

- You can break down hooks, retention, payoff structure on any viral video

- You understand content psychology — why people stop scrolling, why they keep watching, why they save and share

- Self-directed — you spot the outlier, plan the iterations, and ship without supervision



---



**Reference 
 on Instagram. That's the bar.



Only apply if you are ready to do a trial task!!

title: Facebook Ads Creative Strategist
description:
*
 Ads Creative Strategist — AI Health & Wellness Brand**



We run paid
 ads at scale for an AI-powered health & wellness brand. We launch large batches of creatives every 3 days, across multiple avatar accounts, in German and English markets.



We need ONE person who owns the
 creative pipeline: iterating our winners AND introducing brand-new ads twice a week, sourced from competitor research.



---



**This role is NOT for you if:**

- You only do organic content

- You don't read ad performance data

- You think a good creative is a pretty creative

- You can't write copy that sells

- You can't research competitors and reverse-engineer what's working



**This role IS for you if you obsess over hooks, copy angles, and CPA — and you can spot why one ad scales to $10K/day while another dies at $50.



---



**What you own**



**1. Iterating our winners**

- Take every winning
 creative we have ? produce 3-5+ iterations

- Test new hooks, new openings, new copy angles, new CTAs

- Keep the proven structure intact while finding the next angle that scales



**2. New ads twice a week (competitor-sourced)**

- Research competitors in Meta Ad Library daily

- Identify their best-performing ads (long-running creatives = working creatives)

- Reverse-engineer hooks, copy angles, mechanisms, CTAs

- Bring those winners into our brand universe — adapted to our avatars, our offer, our voice

- Ship new ads on a twice-weekly cadence to keep our testing pipeline full



**3. Copy (the heart of the role)**

- Write
 ad copy — primary text, headlines, CTAs

- Direct response copywriting: hooks, problem-agitation, social proof, mechanism, offer, urgency

- Match copy angle to audience pain point

- Test angles, not just words — you know the difference



---



**Required**



- Strong direct-response copywriting — you can write a hook that stops scroll and copy that moves people to click

- Hands-on
 ads experience — you've worked inside Ads Manager, you know what scales and what dies and understand basic metrics to improve creatives

- Daily Meta Ad Library use — you already do competitor research as a habit, not a chore

- You can read ad performance data: CTR, CPA, ROAS, hook rate, hold rate

- You can break down any ad into: hook / angle / mechanism / offer / CTA

- Familiarity with AI video tools (VEO, Sora, Kling) and AI avatars enough to recreate our videos

- You understand the difference between organic virality and paid performance — they are NOT the same game



---



**Reference level:** Top scaling DTC health/supplement brands in Meta Ad Library running 100+ active creatives at a time. If you don't already have favorites in this category, this isn't your role.



---



Only apply if you are ready to fullfill a trial task!!

title: Remote Property Finance & Collections Coordinator (Part-Time)
description:
Compensation: $350 USD/month (increase after 30–60 days based on performance)

Hours: 2 hours/day, 5–6 days/week

Schedule: Fixed shift aligned with Jamaica time (e.g. 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM Jamaica time)

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)



About the Role

We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Remote Finance Coordinator to support a growing property rental, storage, and hospitality business. This role focuses on tracking payments, collections, and ensuring all financial activity is recorded accurately.

Core Responsibility

Ensure that all money coming in and going out is tracked, followed up, and recorded accurately — nothing is missed.

Key Responsibilities

Payment Tracking: Track all incoming payments from bank accounts, PayPal, credit card machine, and occasional cash. Match each payment to the correct customer or invoice.

Collections: Follow up on overdue payments via WhatsApp,
, and occasional phone calls (must be comfortable speaking with customers when required). Maintain records of all communications.

Invoicing & Payment Coordination: Generate invoices, track payment status, and ensure all invoices are followed up until paid.

Restaurant Lease Tracking: Confirm weekly rent payments (due Sundays), issue receipts, and track deposits. Calculate weekly sales position by deducting bank charges and company commission.

Bank & Cash Tracking: Record all transactions and categorize income and expenses. Ensure no transactions are missed.

Bills & Payments: Track utilities, vendors, and platform commissions. Prepare weekly payment lists and confirm completion.

Owner Payments: Track amounts due to property owners and assist with monthly summaries.

Reporting: Maintain Google Sheets tracker daily. Provide weekly updates and monthly summaries.

Tools

Google Sheets, WhatsApp,
, PayPal

Requirements

Strong written English. Clear spoken English for occasional calls. Strong attention to detail. Comfortable with numbers and tracking.

Important Notes

This is a long-term part-time role. Work must be completed during the fixed Jamaica-time shift. This role includes collections and follow-ups. It does not include formal accounting or tax work.

Application Process

To apply, please include: a short introduction, relevant experience, tools used, availability, and internet speed. Start your application with the word "CONTROL". Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a test task and submit a short voice recording. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

YOUR ROLE

> Manage client onboarding, scheduling, confirmations, and reminders per SOP

title: Landing Page Builder / E-commerce manager
description:
ALERT: If you have experience with REPLO and Shrine Theme, please include "HAS REPLO and/or SHRINE THEME EXPERIENCE" in your subject line. Applications with this experience will be prioritized.

Are you comfortable using a time tracker while working from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (PH time)?

JOB SUMMARY



As a Shopify Developer / E-commerce Manager, your role goes beyond just building pages.

You will be responsible for maintaining, optimizing, and managing the overall performance of the store—ensuring that everything runs smoothly, converts well, and delivers a strong customer experience.



You’ll play a key role in both execution (building pages) and ownership (keeping the store optimized and up to standard).

-Page Building & Optimization-

Improve existing pages for better performance, conversions, and user experience

Implement CRO best practices and run A/B testing when needed



-Design & Technical Execution-

Configure sections, integrations, scripts, and responsive layouts

Ensure consistency with brand guidelines and design systems



-Troubleshooting & Performance-

Identify and fix layout, loading, or responsiveness issues across devices

Proactively suggest improvements for UX and conversion



-Collaboration-

Work closely with marketing, design, and other tea
mbers to execute campaigns



-Documentation-

Maintain organized records of builds, updates, and changes within the store



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

1–2 years experience working with Shopify (store management + page building)

Hands-on experience with landing page builders (Replo preferred)

Strong understanding of e-commerce UX, layout structure, and conversion principles

Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS (required)

Strong attention to detail and visual consistency

Ability to follow brand guidelines and design systems

Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience using Replo

Experience with Shrine Theme

Background in managing or optimizing Shopify stores (not just building pages)



WHY WORK WITH US?

Fully remote

Stable, long-term opportunity

Supportive work environment, collaborative, respectful, and growth-focused

Weekly pay via Wise

title: Creative Strategist Meta Ads Ecom Dropshipping
description:
We’re looking for a Creative Strategist who actually understands why ads convert — not someone who just throws ideas around.

If you don’t deeply understand avatar, messaging, and conversion psychology, this is not for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Creating ad angles, hooks, and concepts based on that avatar

Structuring VSL frameworks + ad scripts

Making sure the ad ? landing page ? offer all align

Analyzing what’s working and doubling down on it

Briefing editors/creators with clear direction (not vague ideas)

Iterating fast based on performance data

What We’re Looking For

Strong understanding of:

Direct response marketing

Customer psychology

Avatar research

Ability to answer:

Who is this for?

Why would they care?

What would stop them from buying?

Experience with Meta ads 
/Instagram)

Knows how to:

Match creative style to audience

Match messaging to landing page

Identify winning angles vs dead ones

Can break down ads like:

“This works because of X hook + Y emotional trigger”

You Should Be Able To

Write:

Hooks

Ad scripts

VSL structures

Look at a landing page and instantly see:

What’s missing

What doesn’t match the ad

Take a winning ad and scale it with variations that make sense

Bonus If You

Have worked with eCommerce brands

Understand offer creation

Have experience with AI ad workflows

Can read data (CTR, hold rate, CVR) and translate it into creative decisions

To Apply



Send:



1–2 products you’ve worked on

The avatar

The angle

Why it worked

Your rate (monthly preferred)

Important



We don’t need “creative ideas.”

We need someone who understands what makes people buy.



If you can’t clearly explain why something works, this isn’t for you.

title: Video Editor — Meta Ads (Auto Detailing / Automotive Niche)
description:
About Us

We are a client acquisition agency that works exclusively with car detailing, ceramic coating, and paint protection film (PPF) shops across the United States. We run Meta ad campaigns for our clients and produce short-form video ads to drive leads for their businesses.

We are growing fast. This role starts part-time but has a clear path to full-time as we scale our client base.



What You'll Be Doing

You will receive raw footage, a written script, and a voiceover file (generated via ElevenLabs or similar) and turn them into finished Meta ad creatives ready to launch.

Specific responsibilities:



Edit raw video footage into short-for
ta ads (15-60 seconds)

Sync edits to provided voiceover files — pacing and cuts must follow the VO

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and background music per the brief

Export in multiple formats and aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) for Meta placements

Deliver files via Google Drive, organized per the structure we provide

Manage tasks and deadlines inside ClickUp

Handle revisions based on performance feedback as we test creatives

Scale with us — volume increases as we add clients



You will never write the script. Scripts and voiceovers are handled by our team.



Volume

We currently manage 10-15 clients. Video volume per client ranges from 1-12 per month depending on their ad budget and stage. Total monthly output will scale over time.



Turnaround Expectations

Turnaround depends on complexity. Simple single-cut ads with VO and captions: 24-48 hours. More complex multi-scene edits: 48-72 hours. You will always know the deadline before you start.



Requirements



Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar — we are open to your preferred software as long as output quality is high

Experience editing short-form paid ad creatives (not just content or YouTube videos)

Strong sense of pacing — you know how to cut to a voiceover and keep attention

Comfortable generating voiceovers in ElevenLabs or a similar AI voice platform when needed

Organized and self-managed — you handle your own deadlines without being chased

Comfortable working inside ClickUp for task management and Google Drive for file delivery

Responds within the same business day via ClickUp, Slack, or

Portfolio with real examples of short-form or paid ad edits required to apply





Nice to Have



Prior experience editing ads for local service businesses or automotive/car detailing & paint protection businesses

Familiar with direct-response ad structure: hook, problem, offer, CTA

Able to do basic color correction and audio cleanup





Pay

Open to per-video or monthly retainer depending on your experience and volume fit. Include your preferred structure and rate when you apply.

title: Operations Coordinator VA
description:
Overview 



We are seeking an execution-focused Operations Coordinator to support our U.S. supply chain and fulfillment operations. This role sits at the intersection of production, inventory management, logistics, and wholesale fulfillment, ensuring products move efficiently from manufacturers to warehouses and retail partners. You will be responsible for managing multiple systems, vendors, and workflows while maintaining accurate inventory and clear documentation. 



Work Structure & Requirements

Rate: $10 an hour

Work Hours: EST, 1am PHT onwards



Key Responsibilities

• Production & Supplier Coordination: Act as the primary contact for contract manufacturers and suppliers, managing production timelines and submitting purchase orders. 

• Inventory Management: Own day-to-day tracking across all locations (3PLs, warehouses, in-transit) and maintain accurate records in ERP and Shopify. 

• Fulfillment & 3PL Management: Oversee DTC fulfillment flows and troubleshoot issues such as missed shipments, delays, and inventory discrepancies. 

• Wholesale & EDI Operations: Process B2B sales orders and manage EDI-based invoicing while ensuring compliance with retailer-specific routing guides. 

• Logistics & Freight: Coordinate domestic and international shipments, request RFQs to secure competitive rates, and schedule pickups with carriers. 

• Process Improvement: Maintain operational dashboards and create/improve SOPs for recurring workflows in tools like 
 and Excel. 



Required Skills & Experience

• 3–5+ years of experience in operations, logistics, supply chain, or fulfillment (CPG preferred). 

• Hands-on experience with 3PL management (ShipBob strongly preferred). 

• Working knowledge of Shopify inventory and fulfillment workflows. 

• High proficiency in Excel and operational reporting. 

• Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently in a remote environment. 



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Please don't apply if you're not an experienced CPA with 5+ years.



Join the team as a Senior cloud accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

General

Requirements

- Must-Haves

You will work closely with the founder to define the target customer and ensure the business presents itself powerfully for both retail and fundraising conversations. 



Timezone: Eastern Standard Timezone (EST)



Key Responsibilities

• Brand Strategy: Establish brand values, tone of voice, messaging hierarchy, and market differentiation. 

• Narrative Building: Shape the founder story and brand narrative for investor and retail conversations. 

• Packaging Design: Lead the creative direction for SKUs, balancing shelf presence with operational practicality and retail readiness standards. 

• Visual Identity: Develop logo systems, typography, color palettes, and imagery direction that scale across digital and wholesale touchpoints. 

• Digital System: Ensure consistency across decks, social content, and product pages, while supporting SEO foundations to improve discoverability. 

• Consumer Research: Structure feedback loops around packaging preference and identify opportunities to improve conversion through messaging. 



Required Skills & Experience

• Strong experience in CPG brand strategy, packaging, and creative direction. 

• Deep understanding of consumer behavior and how packaging influences purchasing decisions. 

• Excellent visual judgment and strong taste level. 

• Experience with high-quality e-commerce website design and visual UX. 

• Working knowledge of SEO best practices as they integrate with brand storytelling. 

• Highly organized and confident managing multiple moving pieces across teams. 



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Outdoor & Travel Photography Colorist - Lightroom & Photoshop
description:
We're looking for someone highly proficient in Lightroom and Photoshop. 



This role will include cleaning up and polishing lifestyle and exterior/location based images - ideal candidates will have a strong eye for making images feel natural, clean and not over-edited.



This is an opportunity for a long term collaboration - at least 3 months, as of now, with the likelihood of continuing beyond that.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Edit 30–50 hero landscape images per project with revisions, if necessary (~2 projects per month across our brand client roster)

- Build and refine a custom look for each brand and apply it consistently across the project

- Pull depth, color, and atmosphere out of RAW landscape files

- Reach for Photoshop when Lightroom isn't enough (sky/foreground compositing, luminosity masking)



YOU MUST BE STRONG IN

- Adobe Lightroom Classic at an expert level — graduated and radial filters, AI/local masking, HSL, tone curve, calibration, custom presets

- Adobe Photoshop for sky, foreground, and luminosity-mask compositing when needed

- Pulling depth and atmosphere out of flat midday landscape shots

- Holding a brand look consistent across an entire project

- Range across light conditions — golden hour, blue hour, midday, overcast



YOUR PORTFOLIO MUST SHOW

- Real landscape work

- Mastery of natural color (skies that look like skies, not Instagram filters)

- At least 5 finished landscape edits, ideally with before/after pairs



NICE TO HAVE

- Drone photo editing experience

- Past work with travel, automotive, outdoor lifestyle, or production company clients

- A custom preset pack you've built and used in client work



HOW TO APPLY



1. Submit your portfolio or 5 best landscape edits — before/after preferred — with a 1-sentence note on what you did to each

2. Your per-image rate or monthly rate for ~100 images

3. Turnaround time per image

4. Your availability



Selected candidates will be given a paid test image to color.

title: Graphic Designer (Performance Marketing) [Singapore Company]
description:
1) About Us



Symple Wellness created KYOR, a science-backed wellness brand focused on clean formulations, clinically studied ingredients, and real results.



Our hero product line is designed to simplify skincare and boost whole-body wellness — empowering individuals to glow confidently from the inside out.



Website: kyor.co/



We are rapidly expanding, especially in the US market, and we’re looking for a creative, analytical, and performance-driven Graphic Designer who specialises in ad research, ad content planning, and ad creative development.



This is a highly impactful role where your visuals directly influence scaling, conversions, and campaign success.



2) What You'll Do



-Design 15–30+ static and motion ad creatives per week across Meta (Feed, Reels, Stories), TikTok, and other social platforms

-Translate creative briefs and messaging angles into visual concepts that align with the KYOR brand identity

-Maintain and extend KYOR's brand kits, design systems, and templates that allow for fast iteration

-Design supporting assets: landing page graphics,
 creative, organic social, pitch decks

-Collaborate with marketing and copywriters to ideate hooks, formats, and concepts

-Use AI tools to accelerate ideation, asset generation, and production workflows

-Stay on top of platform trends, format changes, and what's working in the feeds

-Organise and version files so the team can find, repurpose, and iterate quickly





3) What You Bring



Must-haves



-1+ year of graphic design experience (internship, junior agency role, freelance, or strong portfolio of personal/student work counts)

-Working proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator, plus Canva

-A portfolio that shows visual sensibility — clean typography, strong layout, thoughtful composition. Paid social or beauty/lifestyle work is a bonus

-Ability to work fast and iterate — you understand that paid social rewards speed and volume over perfection

-Comfort taking direction, accepting feedback, and revising work without ego

-Hungry to learn, curious about marketing, and excited by the idea that your work will be measured by performance, not just praise



4) AI proficiency (required)

We expect every designer on our team to be using AI to work smarter and faster. You should already be comfortable with — or eager to learn — the tools we use day to day:



-Image generation: Nano Banana (Google Gemini's image model), ChatGPT Images 2.0, Canva AI

-Photo editing & enhancement: Photoshop (incl. Generative Fill / Generative Expand), Illustrator, Canva

-Video & motion: Seedance 2.0, Veo 3

-Workflow & ideation: ChatGPT, Claude, or similar for brainstorming, copy support, prompt engineering



In the interview process, you'll be asked to demonstrate how you use AI in your real workflow — not just that you've tried these tools, but how you've integrated them into how you design. If you haven't used some of the specific tools above, that's okay — but you should have hands-on experience with comparable AI tools and be ready to learn ours quickly.



Nice-to-haves



-Personal interest in beauty, wellness, or skincare (you're a KYOR target customer or close to one)

-Basic motion design or video editing skills (After Effects, CapCut, Premiere)

-Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager, performance metrics (CTR, CPA, hook rate), or creative testing concepts

-Experience with UGC and influencer content

-Photography or art direction sensibility



5) How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with the subject line: "I Am Your Graphic Designer — [Your Name]"



-Your CV

-A link to your portfolio (Behance, personal site, Instagram, or PDF)

-A 3–5 sentence note on which AI tools you currently use in your design workflow



We respond to every application within 5 working days. Shortlisted candidates will go through a short two-round process: a 15-minute personality profiling assessment, followed by a focused design test (~1.5 hours of work, completed within 24 hours).

title: Remote (Online) Sales Closer | Sales Specialist | Earn More Than +PHP100,000/pm
description:
100% Remote | Full-time Contractor | Base $3.10/hour (~PHP177/hour) + Uncapped Commission | Average Team Earnings: PHP100,000+ per month (commission-driven) | Schedule: 50+ hours per week



We are a Philippines-based remote sales agency partnering with a portfolio of online social media clients across the US market. Our team helps clients grow their audiences, retain their customers, and convert engagement into recurring revenue using purpose-built messaging CRMs. We are scaling fast and need fluent English-speaking sales operators who can close.



You are the voice that turns inbound interest into paying customers. Every day, hundreds of warm leads land in our clients' inboxes. Your job: respond fast, build genuine rapport, and guide those conversations into sales. The whole role happens through written English. No calls. No video. Just messages, leaderboards, and commission checks.



If your background includes customer support, online sales, virtual assistance, or social media management, the workflow will click immediately. The catch is the ceiling: 94% of our tea
mbers hit PHP100,000+ per month within three months, mostly from commission. There is no comparable remote sales role on this platform.



What You Will Do:

- Reply to inbound customer messages in real time during your shift

- Build rapport that turns one-time buyers into loyal repeat customers

- Promote and sell premium digital content using proven scripts and your own personality

- Hit daily and weekly revenue targets tracked live in our internal dashboards

- Take direct coaching from your shift manager and apply it the same shift



How You Get Paid?

- Base rate at $3.10/hour (~PHP177/hour) starting, paid weekly from day one

- Commission (the actual paycheck): Uncapped on every dollar of revenue you bring in. Your commission percentage scales with your position on the sales leaderboard - the higher you rank, the bigger your cut. We provide live earnings tracker so you always know where you stand, paid weekly alongside your base.



The Reality of Earnings:

- 94% of our current team earns PHP100,000+ per month after their first 90 days

- Top performers earn multiples of that

- Underperformers earn less and eventually lose their seat

- Your paycheck is a mirror of your sales output - we hand you the scripts, the training, and the coaching, but you have to execute

- Trial shift is paid if you are accepted onto the team



Who We Are Looking For:

- Native-level written English with an American casual tone

- Sales instinct - you read people quickly, build genuine interest, and close through writing

- High-speed reliable internet and a quiet, distraction-free workspace

- Fast typist (70+ WPM) capable of running multiple client conversations in parallel

- Shift flexibility - we operate on US time zones because our clients are US-based

- Coachable - you take feedback seriously, follow what works, and constantly sharpen

- Hungry - this role rewards effort. Treat it like a clock-in job and you will earn base and lose your spot. Treat it like your own business and you will earn six figures



Bonus Points:

- Prior experience as an Online Sales Rep, VA, or Customer Support Rep for a US-based company

- Background in sales, copywriting, or digital marketing



Your Schedule:

- Minimum 48 hours per week. We need operators who can show up consistently across US-friendly shifts.



Hiring Process:

- Written test on our platform - sample sales scenarios scored on tone and selling instinct

- Interview with our Operations Manager (15 minutes)

- Paid trial shift - 4 to 8 hours running real conversations with live clients



How to Apply

- Submit your application at: 

- All candidates must apply through the portal.

title: Video Reviewer & AI Voice-Over Preparation Assistant ($0.50 per Video)
description:
We are looking for detail-oriented freelancers to help us review short tutorial videos before they are processed with AI voice-over. This job is simple, consistent, and long-term.



Rate: $0.50 USD per video

Video length: 1–4 minutes

Workload: 50–200 videos per week



???? Job Overview

Your job is to watch tutorial videos, check their subtitles, and make sure they meet our quality standards.

You do not need to edit video or know Python — the work is purely review + verification.



? What You’ll Do

1. Review Video Quality

Confirm the content matches the video title

Check resolution (must be 1080p+)

Ensure the video is clear, readable, and correctly paced

Verify that the “Subscribe” animation and ending animation are included



2. Review Tutorial Flow

Steps must be logical and complete

No missing explanations

No random or irrelevant actions



3. Check Subtitles (.srt file)

Subtitles must match the spoken audio

Timing must be correct

Sentences should be split naturally

SRT format must be correct



4. Approve Files for AI Voice-Over

Once video + subtitles are correct, mark it as approved

(Optional) Quickly check the AI-narrated output



???? Requirements



Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow a checklist

Basic understanding of video clarity and pacing

Familiarity with subtitles (SRT) is a plus

Good English reading/listening skills

No editing skills required. No technical skills required.



???? Why This Job Is Easy



Tasks follow a step-by-step checklist

Videos are short

Work is repetitive and predictable

You can work anytime



Long-term opportunity with potential to review hundreds of videos



???? Payment

$0.50 USD per video reviewed



???? How to Apply

Please answer the following briefly:

Do you have experience reviewing videos or subtitles?

What is your weekly availability?

Why are you a good fit for this role?



Deliverables

For each assigned video, the freelancer must provide:

Video review result (pass/fail)

Brief notes on any issues found (video quality, pacing, missing steps, etc.)

Subtitle (SRT) accuracy check (correct/not correct)

Approval status (ready for AI voice-over or needs fixes)

We will adjust compensation based on performance to make sure you are well compensated based on results.





About Us



Heavy Duty Leads helps US contractor businesses (concrete, roofing, plumbing, HVAC, septic) get more customers through online marketing. Our clients pay $5,750-$18,750 for our services.



We need appointment setters to call US business owners and book discovery calls.

 and phone

Work Hours



US business hours required. You pick your schedule, but calls must happen when US business owners are available:

title: Outreach Specialist Needed
description:
WHO ARE WE?



We are a longevity company. We own and operate a portfolio of consumer brands, and our background is in direct response marketing. Sleepmaxx AI is our first software product - an iOS app focused on sleep optimization.



Our longer-term plan goes beyond a single app. We intend to develop our own models, build out a research layer, and eventually move into hardware. The broader goal is to contribute to extending healthy human lifespan and making a longer, better life more accessible. This is a long road, and we are starting step by step.



ABOUT THE ROLE



This is a full-time Operations & Outreach Assistant role. You will work directly with the founder on two things: keeping the day-to-day running, and owning creator outreach for Sleepmaxx AI.



Half the job is operations - inbox triage, scheduling, vendor coordination, keeping the trackers clean, and making sure nothing slips. The other half is outreach - researching creators we want to partner with, writing first-touch messages, running the follow-up cadence, and moving conversations forward to a call or a deal.



The work is remote and full-time: five days a week, eight-hour shifts, two days off. You should expect daily contact with the founder.







HOW TO APPLY? If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form: 















WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?



- Socially intelligent. You will be writing to creators with real audiences. You need to read tone, match register, and represent the brand the way a thoughtful person would — not the way a template does. Copy-paste outreach is not what this role is.

- Reliable and precise. You will own follow-ups, trackers, and processes that the team depends on. When something is given to you, it gets done on time, correctly, the first time. We should not have to check whether you did it.

- Self-directed. We are scrappy and small. You should be the kind of person who finds the answer before asking, and asks a clear, specific question when you genuinely cannot. People who need to be piggybacked through every task will not work here.

- You should also be organized, fluent in English, comfortable with tools like Asana, Slack, Gmail, and sheets/CRMs, and good with people on both sides - creators and the team.





WHAT YOU’LL DO?



- Run creator outreach end-to-end: research, first-touch messages, follow-ups, booking calls

- Own the partnership pipeline and keep it updated daily — no leads dropped

- Handle daily operational tasks for the founder: inbox triage, scheduling, document prep, vendor coordination

- Keep internal processes clean — trackers, SOPs, recurring workflows

- Surface what is stuck, propose how to unstick it, and move



HOW TO APPLY? If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form: 





WHAT WE’D LOVE TO SEE?



- Past outreach, partnerships, ideally with creators or influencers

- Experience supporting a founder or small team in a fast-moving environment

- Genuine interest in sleep, longevity, or wellness

- Strong written English and a clear, calm communication style





HOW TO APPLY? If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form:

title: Customer Support Rep (remote)
description:
Job Description – Customer Support Representative (Remote)



We are looking for a patient, people-oriented and reliable Customer Support Representative to join our e-commerce team. In this role, you will be the first point of contact for our customers — handling their questions, concerns and complaints in a way that leaves them feeling heard, helped and valued.



What you will be doing:

Ticket handling: Managing incoming customer support tickets in a timely and professional manner, ensuring every customer receives a clear and helpful response. You will be working with a helpdesk tool such as Gorgias or a similar platform.



Order tracking: Responding to "Where is my order?" enquiries — our most common ticket type. You will communicate with customers about shipping updates, delays and tracking information in a calm and reassuring way.



Refund & return requests: Handling refund and return enquiries in line with our store policies. You will know how to balance customer satisfaction with company guidelines — finding solutions that work for both sides.



Product questions: Answering questions about sizing, materials, availability and product details. You will need to be familiar with our product range and know how to guide customers toward the right choice.



Dispute & complaint handling: De-escalating frustrated or unhappy customers with empathy and professionalism. Experience dealing with chargebacks or PayPal disputes is a strong advantage.



General customer communication: Following up on unresolved cases, chasing suppliers for updates when needed, and keeping customers informed every step of the way.



What we are looking for:

Dropshipping experience: Previous experience working in customer support for a dropshipping store is a strong advantage. You understand what long shipping times mean for customers — and how to handle them.



Empathy & patience: You genuinely enjoy helping people and can stay calm and professional even when customers are frustrated or upset.



Attention to detail: Accurate, consistent communication matters. You read carefully before you respond.

Fluent in English: A strong command of written English is essential. Your responses need to read naturally, warmly and professionally.



Familiarity with tools: Experience with Gorgias, Shopify, or similar platforms is a plus. Comfortable working with tracking tools and order management systems.



Organised & independent: Able to manage a high volume of tickets, prioritise effectively, and work autonomously without constant supervision.



Good communication: Responsive, proactive and clear. If something is unclear or needs escalating, you flag it — you do not wait to be asked.



This is a remote position. We are looking for someone who takes pride in making customers feel taken care of — and who wants to grow alongside fast-moving e-commerce store(s).



Ready to apply? Please fill in our application form below:
